Name: Music & Arts
Description: The first Music & Arts, run by founder Benjamin O’Brien, opened in 1952 and was located in a small house in Bethesda, MD. Music & Arts now has more than 500 retail and affiliate locations, about 120 educational representatives and roughly 27,000 lesson students making it the nation’s largest school music retailer and lesson provider. Now based in Frederick, MD, the company of trained musicians offers friendly service for everything musical in your life including instruments, lessons, rentals and repairs. Visit MusicArts.com for more information.

Name: Gear4music Ltd.
Description:
Gear4music is one of Europe’s leading online retailers of musical instruments and music equipment. Founded in the UK, we’ve grown from a specialist startup into an international, multi-brand business serving millions of customers globally.  

We offer a wide range of instruments, studio equipment, live sound gear, lighting, and software for musicians of all levels — from beginners and hobbyists to advanced and professional musicians. Alongside products from world-leading third-party names, we also design and develop our own exclusive Gear4music brands, offering high-quality instruments and equipment at exceptional value.

Our steady growth means we now operate dedicated localised websites across multiple European markets, supported by distribution centres in the UK, Sweden, Germany, Ireland and Spain. This international infrastructure allows us to deliver quickly and reliably while continuing to scale sustainably.

Innovation is central to the way we work. As a digital-first business, we invest heavily in technology, data, and customer experience, from intuitive e-commerce platforms to advanced logistics and in-house product development. Our teams work together to continually improve how musicians discover, purchase, and receive their gear.

We’re also committed to responsible growth. Through sustainable initiatives, our second-hand and trade-in platforms, and ongoing work to reduce our environmental impact, we aim to support the future of music as well as the planet.

Above all, though, our business is powered by people who are passionate about music. Our diverse teams across Europe bring creativity and expertise to everything we do, united by a shared mission: to make music accessible to everyone.

Name: Chicago Music Exchange
Description:
For 30 years we have been serving musicians, collectors and friends who want straight answers, expertise, and first-hand knowledge. All of our staff are passionate about what we sell and who we sell to, whether you talk to us on the phone about a vintage Gibson Les Paul gold top, come to the store to check out an Fulltone pedal, or email us about a Marshall amp.  All of the staff you talk to are musicians who pay attention to the details, as well as technicians who have seen and fixed just about everything you can think of. We do love to be challenged on the geeky stuff. 

As a premiere authority on vintage, new, and used music equipment, our goal at Chicago Music Exchange is to give you the finest selection of guitars, amps, bass, effects, and novelty musical instruments in the world, with service that will blow you away. 

Stop by our flagship store when you are in town to meet us in person and experience our extraordinary store first-hand!

Name: Bax Music
Description:
WE SUPPORT YOUR STAGE

Muziek is passie en beleving en daar wil Bax Music niet alleen deel van uitmaken, maar ook het verschil in maken. Meer service, meer passie, meer beleving en vooral meer muziek!

Bax Music (voorheen Bax-shop) is met 46.000 voorradige producten, 420 specialisten en 4 fysieke winkels, de grootste online muziekwinkel van de Benelux. 

Het ruime aanbod loopt uiteen van oordopjes, gitaren en drumstellen tot volwaardige licht- en geluidsinstallaties voor evenementen. Met het brede assortiment worden muziekliefhebbers en -makers op hun wenken bediend.  

In slechts 15 jaar tijd groeide de jaaromzet naar meer dan 100 miljoen en ruim 100.000 verstuurde pakketten per jaar.


Het team achter Bax Music bestaat uit een jong team van professionals die in een vriendschappelijke sfeer hard werken om een gezamenlijk doel te bereiken. Servicegerichtheid, ambitieus, vernieuwend en professionaliteit zijn de kernwaarden van Bax Music.

Bax Music heeft regelmatig vacatures, kijk voor de actuele vacatures op www.werkenbijbax-shop.nl!

Name: Dunlop Manufacturing, Inc.
Description: From picks to pedals and every accessory in between, Dunlop Manufacturing has been creating world-class gear for musicians for 50 years. We consistently create the best selling picks and analog electronics, and carry a large line of accessories that set the industry standards in their respective fields. We have a long list of legendary and current day superstars who all share a passion for our gear. Whether it’s pushing new innovations with our string line, or tweaking classic sounds with our vintage pedals, we live to play live.

Name: AlphaTheta Music Americas, Inc.
Description:
AlphaTheta Music Americas, Inc. is the subsidiary of AlphaTheta Corporation responsible for sales and marketing in North, Central, and South America.

AlphaTheta’s mission is “One Through Music.” It’s our aim to make meaningful contributions to the world through innovative technology and high-quality audio equipment, software, and services, and by fostering connections with the music community. 

Our core DJ business started in 1994 as a division of Pioneer Corporation and has played a pivotal role in shaping and advancing dance music and DJ culture around the world. In 2015, the company became independent as Pioneer DJ Corporation and, in 2020, with the aspiration to grow in new business areas, its name was changed to AlphaTheta Corporation. In 2024, we began releasing products with the AlphaTheta name, helping it inherit the longstanding trust we’ve built with customers by employing the technical and design know-how we’ve accumulated over the years, all of which we aim to develop further. We want customers to see familiarity and playfulness in us while offering value in fresh and unexpected ways, expanding horizons in ways only AlphaTheta can. 

Innovation is at the heart of everything we do. We’re committed to continuously evolving and being an indispensable part of society by fulfilling the diverse needs of our customers. AlphaTheta Corporation's portfolio includes brands such as AlphaTheta, Pioneer DJ, rekordbox, KUVO, TORAIZ, and Pioneer PRO AUDIO.
 
AlphaTheta Corporation is in the Noritsu Koki (TSE:7744) Group.

Name: Kadence
Description:
Kadence, owned and operated by Cresurge Private Limited (founded in 2015), is the No. 1 provider in the music industry. We are dedicated to offering high-quality instruments that inspire creativity and elevate musical experiences for enthusiasts and professionals alike. 

With over 2 million happy customers and a diverse range of more than 500 types of instruments, we cater to musicians of all levels and genres.

At Kadence, we're not just selling instruments; we're building a global community of music lovers, one satisfied customer at a time. Our extensive selection ensures that every musician can find the perfect instrument to express their unique voice. We actively support local music communities through sponsorships, events, and educational initiatives, fostering a culture of creativity, collaboration, and inclusion.

Name: AlphaTheta Corporation
Description:
AlphaTheta’s mission is “One Through Music.” It’s our aim to make meaningful contributions to the world through innovative technology and high-quality audio equipment, software, and services, and by fostering connections with the music community.

Our core DJ business started in 1994 as a division of Pioneer Corporation and has played a pivotal role in shaping and advancing dance music and DJ culture around the world. Name: Star's Music
Description:
Vente d'instrument de musique et de matériel de sonorisation, l'enseigne STAR'S MUSIC regroupe 3 enseignes à PARIS, LILLE et LYON ainsi qu'une boutique en ligne.

Le plus vieux magasin est située à Paris dans le quartier de Pigalle depuis 1977.

Guitares & Basses, Pianos & Claviers, Synthés & Machines, Matériel DJ, Sono & Light, Home Studio, Micros, Cables & Accessoires, Star's Music est un magasin généraliste qui propose un large choix d'instruments et matériel de marque pour les musiciens amateurs et professionnels.

Name: PMT - Play Music Today
Description:
At PMT we live, sleep, and breathe music.

Our mission: To inspire and enable more people than ever to Play Music Today.

Expect so much more than the finest instruments and equipment - at unbeatable price-checked value.

When you shop with us, you can be sure you will receive all the advice, back-up, and after-sales service you will need. Whatever level of experience musician you are.

Be ready to join our soon to launch ‘Backstage’ loyalty program where you will have instant access to news, competitions, exclusive discounts and so much more

But most of all, visit one of our world class music stores across the UK where your experience is our priority.

Check out the instruments and equipment waiting there for you. Play them. Get tuition. Watch demonstrations. Talk to our technicians for repair and tweaking.

Discover new stuff. Meet kindred spirits. Hang out. Belong.

Welcome to PMT.

Name: GAPPU
Description: Voila! We’ve come to you to get your passion for music a percussive treatment with our wide range of percussion instruments. Cajon, Guitar, Ukulele, Wooden Shaker, Wooden Bongo, Foot Tambourine, Cajon Drum, Octa Snare Cajon, Tilt Cajon, Travel Cajon, Small Cajon and Impulse Cajon are our prime creations to feed your soul. The proficient craftsmen devise them with care and compassion in our workshop while making productivity and longevity the priorities. All our instruments produce quality sound with unparalleled excellence.

Name: Pearl Music Europe
Description:
Pearl Music Europe B.V. is a wholly owned subsidiary of the Pearl Musical Instrument Company, headquartered in Chiba, Japan. Since Pearl was founded in 1946, it has grown to become the largest drum company in the world, with eight subsidiaries in Japan, Taiwan, China, the United States, and the Netherlands. With over 650 employees working towards a common goal and the dedication of the founding Yanagisawa family, Pearl is considered the leader in product innovation, artist recognition, and quality standards.

Pearl offers a comprehensive range of percussion instruments to meet the diverse needs of musicians worldwide, including drum sets, marching percussion, Latin percussion, orchestral percussion, and more. In addition to percussion, Pearl is also a leading manufacturer of flutes and other woodwind instruments.

Name: YAMAHA MUSIC EUROPE GMBH (UK)
Description:
Yamaha's history began when its founder, Torakusu Yamaha, repaired a broken reed organ in 1887. Shortly thereafter, he successfully completed the first reed organ to be built in Japan.

Since then, Yamaha has continued to produce high-quality products by blending traditional craftsmanship with advanced digital technology. The quality of sound produced by a Yamaha musical instrument reflects the long years of accumulated technical expertise and the skilled craftsmanship of the Company.

With our unique expertise and sensibilities, gained from our devotion to sound and music, the Group is committed to creating excitement and cultural inspiration together with people around the world.

Name: Headline Audio
Description: Connecting musicians and music creators with the finest instruments, live performance tools and recording equipment available. With an unwavering commitment, 50 years of industry insider knowledge, and of course, a passion for music, we provide the expertise that amplifies the brands we represent.

Name: MUSIC DISTRICT Middle East
Description: The authorized distributor innovative musical brands like Conn-Selmer, The ONE Smart Piano, Manhasset stands, Violin Schonbach and Gliga violins.

Name: HOUSE OF PIANOS UAE
Description: Founded in 2012 in Dubai, House of Pianos has established itself as a distinguished beacon in the musical landscape of the UAE and the GCC. As the exclusive and authorized distributor of Steinway & Sons and Blüthner Pianos, we are committed to bringing unparalleled quality to our discerning clientele. Our passion extends beyond sales; we are dedicated supporters of music and musicians, actively promoting musical education in the region. Proudly part of ADMIRAL WORLD General Trading LLC, we have also built the UAE's first Steinway Concert Hall, a testament to our commitment to the arts, hosting free Community Concerts to inspire and nurture a love for music.   #HouseOfPianos #MusicEducation #SteinwayConcertHall #UAE

Name: Donner Music
Description:
Donner is a musical instruments brand owned by Rantion Technology Co., Ltd., a rapidly growing music technology company in the global e-commerce market. 
As a young brand in the MI industry, Donner has been committed to creating innovative, enjoyable, and aesthetically pleasing musical instruments since 2012. This is what drove Donner to pioneer its products, which have brought the joy of musical performance to people across the world. 
Relying on its strong R&D team, Donner has become well-known for its high-quality and innovative musical instruments and accessories. Donner's musical instruments deliver the reflections, ideas, and values of the player.
For any further interest, please reach out to us via email.
Career Inquiry: global-recruitment@donnermusic.com
Media Inquiry: press@donnermusic.com
Global Business: sale@donnermusic.com

Name: Musik Hug AG
Description:
Welcome to Musik Hug on LinkedIn! For over two centuries, since 1807, our passion for music has been resonating. We are not just experts, but true enthusiasts in the music industry.

At Musik Hug, it's all about musical instruments and sheet music. Whether it's purchasing, maintaining, or repairing keyboard, wind, percussion, or string instruments – we are your competent partner. Our network extends across 10 locations in German-speaking and Western Switzerland. The Musik Hug Group, which includes Musica Nova, employs about 200 staff members today. They are all specialists in the areas of retail and wholesale, administration, instrument building/repair, and piano services.

Visit us and immerse yourself in our world of music  We can't wait to welcome you!

Name: Svencino
Description:
Svend Christensen is an award-winning violin and bow maker, highly-skilled in the restoration and repair of all stringed instruments and the founder of Svencino, an online music store.

To achieve the highest quality in sound Svend’s draws from his studies in fine arts, his natural talent for engineering as well as, a lifelong interest in physics.

Based in South Africa, his reputation as one of the country’s finest luthiers and the company’s excellent customer service have contributed to the growth of his client base beyond the country’s borders and the African continent. His work is being sold in the U.S.A., Europe and the Middle-East.

Svend’s unique approach to his craft and his business has also been shaped by his his drive for innovation. Listening carefully to the musicians who entrust their instruments to him for improved sound Svend responds with better designs, custom-made parts at affordable prices.

Svend will refinish instruments to playability perfection. He also accepts commissions for bows and bowed instruments.

Name: Vanguard Woodwinds New York City
Description:
We specialize in professional Woodwind Repair, Refacing and Restoration of Woodwind Mouthpieces.
We strive to make your instrument play and sound as good or better than when it came out of the factory, every time.

Name: Music Inc. Magazine
Description:
Each month, Music Inc. delivers profit-building insight and expert business advice to musical products retailers across North America. 

Our print and digital editions, as well as musicincmag.com and our weekly newsletter, are must-reads for successful retailers and have earned a trophy case full of publishing awards — including Magazine of the Year from the American Society of Business Publication Editors.

Our print and digital editions go to more than 7,400 retail decision-makers. That
list has been carefully curated from a variety of sources to ensure a strong readership with 96% involved in purchasing decisions for their
companies and 90% are owners or top executives.

Our website serves as a home for breaking news and a repository of some of the best how-to articles we’ve published. It’s a great resource for retailers
looking to improve sales and the bottom line.

Name: Strandberg Guitars
Description:
At Strandberg Guitars,  we believe that your best performances come from feeling inspired, and that this inspiration can have many sources. We are convinced that not just the sound of your guitar, or how it feels to play are important components, but also how it makes you feel. From that magic feeling when you look at it from across the room, to when you pick it up, hang it over your shoulder, and strum that first chord and feel it resonate in your hands. All these feelings, along with the sound that hits your ears in that instance, feed back into that inspiration and affects it. 

 Just like we have engineered our components from the highest performance materials and eliminated all potential losses of energy in the strings’ vibration, we break down the other barriers that can inhibit your inspiration. Pick it up, and it hangs light on your shoulder. Set it down, and it rests comfortably in your lap. Lean back, and it doesn’t hit the wall or your bandmate. Touch those strings light as a feather, and the faintest of sounds will resonate. Dig in and it goes wild. It stays in tune. Every single note of a chord rings clear and true. Notes start and end on the right pitch. They sustain until you no longer want them to. Your forearm, wrist and fingers are relaxed and every spark of musical inspiration gets a boost from the tactile feedback you experience from the chambered body and carbon fiber reinforced EndurNeck.

feel better
	sound better

Our mission is to allow guitarists to sound their best, by providing instruments that not only provide the sound they are searching for, but also allow them to practice and much as they want and perform in complete comfort and symbiosis with their instrument.

Name: Allparts Music
Description: Allparts Music offers an incredible selection of guitar and bass parts to manufacturers, wholesalers, musicians, luthiers, retail stores, guitar repair shops, and guitar enthusiasts worldwide.  Offering premium brands like CTS, Switchcraft, Bigsby, Badass, Grover and many more, we’ve become the industry’s home of “premium tools for tone.”  Founded in 1982, and headquartered in Houston, TX, we continue to grow and build on our reputation of unparalleled expertise, selection, and service.

Name: Touch Guitars
Description: Touch Guitar instruments are the culmination of Markus Reuter’s long experience with tapping instruments and his knowledge about the playing technique, combined with the guitar design expertise of initial builder Ed Reynolds, long time player Stefan Huth and the current builder Markus Kirchmayr.

Name: Collings Guitars
Description: Boutique builders crafting world-class acoustic guitars, electric guitars, and mandolins in Austin, Texas.

Name: Make Noise Pro Audio
Description: Since 2015, we have been immersed in the world of used pro audio equipment - driven by an insatiable passion for all things modern, vintage, and obscure! Now selling Used, New and B-Stock items, we cover it all - from microphones and compressors to drum machines and mixing consoles - we’ve even got the cabling and furniture. With free shipping and next-day delivery (on orders before 12pm), Sam and the team at Make Noise Pro Audio are trusted by thousands of buyers across the UK for their studio upgrades.

Name: Mike & Mike's Guitar Bar
Description: We offer full service vintage music gear restoration and feature a curated selection of hundreds of used and vintage instruments available for sale. In addition to guitars and a wide selection of vintage basses, we also sell and service vintage analog synths, electric pianos, effects pedals, combo organs and other music accessories. Reach out to us here, or come visit us at our Seattle, WA showroom!

Name: ProfesionalDJ
Description:

Visita nuestra web

Name: Audio Forum Suomi
Description: Palveleva musiikkikauppa ja hifikauppa Joensuussa, Helsingissä ja verkossa. www.hifi.fi

Name: Chamberlain Music
Description:
Chamberlain Music is an e-commerce Music Education Resources supplier based in the south of England. We have been supplying all things musical to schools & colleges both in the UK and worldwide for 35 years.

The company was founded in a small shop in Weyhill, Haslemere UK in 1990 and has grown steadily over the last 35 years. In January 2023 we moved to superb new premises, with offices and showroom directly opposite an existing 30,000ft warehouse - all just 500 yards from the company's first music store!

Chamberlain Music now has a staff of around 40 people, mostly in the Haslemere offices and warehouse, with some working from home and some in workshops in Leicestershire.

Name: Mega Disconildo
Description: A Mega Disconildo foi fundada em 1985 como uma loja de discos de vinil, proporcionando uma experiência musical única. Em 1995, ampliou seu portfólio ao começar a vender instrumentos musicais e equipamentos de áudio profissional, conquistando rapidamente a confiança de músicos e igrejas. Em 2015, solidificou-se como a maior rede de lojas de instrumentos e áudio do Brasil, com 10 filiais no Rio de Janeiro. Em 2024, a empresa deu um grande passo, inaugurando o maior prédio de música da América Latina, com estúdios, escola de música e espaços de gravação. Com 40 anos de história, a Mega Disconildo permanece um pilar fundamental da cultura musical brasileira, sempre comprometida com a inovação e a excelência.

Name: Candy beat
Description:

Name: Normans Musical Instruments
Description:
We believe in the power of music to change lives and we’re dedicated to making quality instruments accessible to learners and players everywhere.

Through Normans Education, we support Music Teachers, Schools and Music Hubs across the UK with reliable, curriculum-ready instruments from beginner to intermediate level. Our experience in bulk supply, framework agreements and flexible delivery solutions ensures education providers receive dependable service, consistent stock and ongoing support tailored to their needs.

Our Normans Musical Instruments International (NMII) team supports retail and B2B partners with scalable logistics, strong stock availability and a proven dropship service. Whether supplying national retailers or working with international distributors, we offer an efficient, transparent partnership designed to help organisations grow their musical instrument ranges with confidence.

Proud to be a Carbon Literate Organisation, we’re reducing our footprint with improved packaging, optimised logistics and thoughtful internal changes, all part of our wider commitment to sustainability.

Our in-house brands are distributed worldwide and built with developing musicians in mind:
• 3rd Avenue - Guitars and ukuleles
• A-Star - Classroom percussion
• Axus - Digital pianos, keyboards and electronic drum kits
• Forenza - Orchestral strings
• Montreux - Brass and woodwind

We’re always open to connecting with international partners interested in stocking our ranges or expanding distribution opportunities. Get in touch if you’re looking to collaborate with a dependable and sustainability-minded supplier.

Name: KMC Music
Description: At KMC Music we are focused on being a business partner to the thousands of great musical instrument retailers here in the United States. We work hard to have the brands that you need most in stock and ready to get to you quickly. Think of KMC as your warehouse, expanding your inventory with thousands of great products. Enjoy generous financing terms, 24/7 online ordering, drop shipping along with an inventory feed and access to highly knowledgeable veteran sales and customer service teams. We look forward to partnering with you.

Name: ALFASONI SL
Description:
ALFASONI SL S

Somos la tienda de referencia para miles de aficionados a la música desde 1994. No es casualidad, porque tenemos más de 150.000 productos en stock y trabajamos prácticamente con todas las marcas.

Los que ya nos conocen saben que nuestros precios son difíciles de igualar. Además, el equipo Alfasoni está formado por músicos, productores, técnicos de sonido, DJs… Somos de los tuyos! Pregúntanos cualquier duda y te asesoraremos.

El tamaño aquí sí importa. Somos la tienda más grande del sur de Europa, con salas diseñadas para probar cientos de productos y recibir consejo de nuestros especialistas.

Cubrimos toda la gama de precios para que tanto aficionados como profesionales puedan encontrar el equipo perfecto para su proyecto.

Name: Lawrence Music Creations
Description:
Lawrence Guitars, founded by Josh Lawrence, merges the passions of a guitarist, designer, and marketer. Inspired by classic guitar designs of yesteryear, we proudly offer a handcrafted line of guitars, combining traditional craftsmanship with CNC precision for today's guitarist.

Partnering with a master guitar builder, we're poised to shake up the guitar world, honouring classic heritage while introducing unparalleled modern advancements, ergonomics, and impeccable attention-to-detail.

Our debut L1 Highfield series showcases locally sourced Queensland woods with modern industrial flair. Featuring uncompromising construction, superior player comfort, and cutting-edge passive electronics, each guitar embodies elegance and innovation.

Join us on our journey as we merge heritage, craftsmanship, innovation, and music to create truly inspiring instruments for the world stage.

Name: Ciari Guitars
Description:
The Ascender by Ciari Guitars is the only full-size, premium foldable electric guitar on the market.

With our patented folding system, it collapses mid-neck to fit in a backpack — so your guitar is always by your side, from the studio to the stage to the skies.

Each Nashville-crafted Ascender is luthier-assembled in Nashville with parts sourced in the US and abroad, Plek technology, and hand-crafted neck construction and adjustment, fret work and set up for pro playability. Come visit us in the heart of Music City! You can ask questions of our Luthiers, see our Plek in action, and try our Ascenders in our Artist Lounge.

Guitarists say:
“It sounds incredible…”
“Superb playability…”
“Complete game changer…”
“It's not a great travel guitar; it’s a great guitar that travels…!”

At Ciari, we believe musicians should never have to compromise tone for mobility.

(Accredited investor inquiries welcome in accordance with SEC regulations.)

Name: CAHANG
Description: Cahang is an innovative percussion instrument that blends rhythm and design. Invented and designed by Matty Ulenaers and his son Ward, it offers musicians a new way to find their groove. Ward, a cajón player, struggled to move and dance freely with fellow musicians while playing. With no alternative available, father and son began experimenting together. The result: a suspended percussion instrument with a rich palette of sound colors and a highly ergonomic design. The Cahang allows for hours of comfortable playing and fosters deeper interaction with fellow musicians and the audience — a rhythmic revolution born from passion, creativity, and a strong family bond.

Name: Quinlan and Fabish Music Company
Description:
Quinlan and Fabish Music Company is a full-service school music dealer with nine locations throughout the Chicago area, Indiana, and Michigan.  
                                                                           
"A Trusted Partner in Music Education Since 1959"

Name: Steinway & Sons France
Description: Since 1853, Steinway & Sons pianos have set an uncompromising standard for sound, touch, beauty, and investment value. Steinway remains the choice of nine out of 10 concert artists and is the preferred piano of countless musicians, professional and amateur, throughout the world.

Name: LOTFI PIANO TRADING LLC
Description: LOTFI PIANO TRADING: Leading wholesaler of quality used pianos in the Middle East, serving Dubai with excellence.

Name: Music Global
Description:
Nous sommes rêveurs, ambitieux, novateurs, et avant tout, distributeurs d'instruments de musique. La musique change le monde et nous croyons que chaque personne devrait pouvoir y accéder. Depuis la création de l’entreprise en 2013, notre objectif a toujours été de rendre les instruments de musique accessibles à tous.

Aujourd'hui encore, nous sommes les seuls à proposer cette démarche et chaque jour qui passe voit naître de nouveaux musiciens. Grâce à nous, la passion et le plaisir de jouer ne cessent de se développer.

Notre offre est unique. 

Distributeur, nous couvrons aujourd’hui 3 réseaux : les magasins spécialisés, les grandes surfaces et les sites e-commerce. Nous sommes revendeurs de différentes marques comme Fender, Casio ou Veelah mais nous proposons aussi nos marques propres comme Arrow et Naderman.

Nous mettons aussi en vente nos articles dans les magasins spécialisés. En effet, il est important de soutenir ce réseau. Pour cela, nous mettons en place des garanties de marge en proposant un prix d’achat exclusif afin de les préserver.

à l’exemple de nos Rockstation, nous proposons aux  grandes surfaces des concepts “clé en main”. Le mobilier, les instruments, la formation, les animations, la communication... Tout est fourni ! Ce concept fait de nous les leaders exclusifs sur ce secteur. En proposant la vente d’articles de musique en grandes surfaces, nous avons pour objectif de faire découvrir les instruments à des personnes qui ne seraient peut-être jamais entrées dans un magasin de musique.

Afin de toujours rester accessible à tous, nous accordons de l’importance à notre présence sur le web. Notre équipe travaille avec les plus grandes marketplaces du secteur et veille à conserver, sur internet, une logique tarifaire et une segmentation produit cohérente vis à vis des magasins.

Name: Rotosound Music Strings
Description: Rotosound Manufacturing Ltd. is a mechanical or industrial engineering company based out of Sevenoaks, United Kingdom.

Name: Funki
Description: Funki skapar möjligheter för alla att spela musik tillsammans på sina egna villkor. Med instrument som är tillgänglighetsanpassade för personer med intellektuella funktionsnedsättningar, erbjuder Funki ett helt nytt sätt att kommunicera och interagera genom musik!

Name: Broughton Pianos
Description: Broughton Pianos is a family business with over 35 years of experience in the piano industry. We have established ourselves as the ‘Midlands Premier Piano Retailer.’ We are the largest piano showroom in the midlands. We are official dealers for Yamaha, Kawai, Hailun, C.Bechstein, W.Hoffmann and Danemann Pianos. We ensure that we have a wide selection of quality new and used pianos in our showroom, including upright and grand pianos at all times and we will not be beaten on price! Today we represent a wide portfolio or reputable brands and diverse product categories to cater to today's modern needs of musical and audio equipment.

Name: Moon Guitars LLC
Description:
Moon Guitars LLC was founded by Kyle Wolfe in 2017 as a repair shop that offered unique custom build options. Kyle has been active in the guitar industry since starting out in a repair shop in 2007. There he learned the basics of guitar making, which would later develop into a full blown passion for the craft. Starting out making custom replicas of other manufacturers’ shapes for himself, he shifted to occasional customer orders alongside repair work, eventually developing his own unique models.

Moon stopped offering repair services as of early 2020 to focus solely on building instruments. Kyle has made a top priority of investing in the quality of his instruments as he continues to grow the company (although it still remains a one-man operation). 

In addition to providing an array of custom order options, Moon Guitars now also offers production style models made in the US. These budget models are still handmade in the same shop, just without all the custom options and fancier specs available through a custom order.

Name: Harmony Harp
Description:
The Veeh Harp is a portable, custom-made harp that is ideal for anyone who loves music.  It is an inclusive instrument - perfect for all ages, backgrounds, and abilities. The Veeh Harp is a game-changer for anyone who believes it is ‘too late’ to learn an instrument or ‘too hard’ to make music!

Designed and developed in Germany by Hermann Veeh in the late 1980s, the Veeh Harp opened a world of possibilities for people around the globe.  Inspired by the historical ‘chord zither’, Hermann’s ultimate vision was realised in 1992 and the Veeh Harp was born.  Now the harp is available in Australia for the first time!

Harmony Harp is the official and exclusive Australian distributor and service agent of the Veeh Harp and related products.  Owned and operated by the Rumsey Family, Harmony Harp works alongside their German counterparts in bringing the Veeh Harp to people in Australia.  John, Sue, Andrew and Danny decided as a family that such an important instrument needed to be made available to everyone, regardless of musical background, age or ability.

Whether it’s a classic saxophone with a storied past or another vintage treasure, each piece in our collection is meticulously selected for its quality, playability, and character.

Our mission is simple: to provide musicians—whether students, hobbyists, or professionals—with instruments that inspire.

A great instrument isn’t just a tool; it’s a partner in creativity, a bridge to tradition, and a voice waiting to be heard.

Name: Payne Custom Guitars
Description:
Payne is an unconventional breed of guitar maker.

From a small workshop in Queensferry, Scotland, we follow in the time-honoured tradition of making custom guitars by hand. But, like most Scots, we do things a bit differently.

We want to evolve ‘the electric guitar’ without changing ‘the electric guitar’. So our guitars look different, sound different, feel different and play different. But they are as familiar as any guitar you’ve ever played.

Our use of modern technology with traditional craft and innovative design gives our guitars a distinctive character that is contemporary but authentic.

This sense of character runs through our range of original guitar models, each designed to offer versatility, classic looks, rich tone and effortless playability.

Name: NorrSyd Guitars
Description:
So far, I have rescued more than 750 guitars, mandolins and banjos and saved them from being unplayed, being poorly looked after or even getting chopped down to firewood.

I dug them from cellars, found them in storage units, fetched them from creepy houses. I went up icy mountain roads and down steep, dark stairs of recording studios. I received them from people that had stopped playing for health or age reasons, or were left with a guitar or a banjo after the death of a loved one, and wanted those instruments to be passed on to new players. I collected them from just next door and from as far away as the German shores of the Baltic Sea.

More than 600 people came over to my guitar boutique to test play and speed date my instruments. They were absolute beginners and pros, ESC winners, guitaristas and guitareros, recording and performing artist, teachers and students, friends and strangers, composers and songwriters, rockers, bluesers, fingerpickers, classically trained ones and autodidacts, but I'm still waiting for you to come on over!

Name: Greg Boyd's House of Fine Instruments
Description:
Greg Boyd has loved music and musical instruments since he was a very young child. Growing up in a musically active family nurtured his interest, as it was routine for family members to sing or play an instrument.

In the 1970’s Greg began to study important differences between various instruments and their materials, playability, tone, value, etc. He began to travel a lot in mid-to-late ’70’s and 80’s, to festivals, to instrument builders, to small lutherie shops, to large regional stores, etc.

In about 1980, Greg graduated from University of Montana with a degree in Wood Science. This formal training has been invaluable in understanding various woods and their tonal properties, when evaluating instruments or discussing their attributes.

In the late 1980’s an opportunity to open a music store presented itself to Greg.

In 1990 he was a partner in “The Stringed Instrument Division” until June 1997, when Greg left to open “The House of Fine Instruments”, in Missoula, Montana.

This is the same “House of Fine Instruments” still in business today. We can proudly say we’ve shipped instruments and accessories to every civilized country in the world (and one or two that aren’t so civilized).

Our business model is built around finding great used and vintage instruments… but also finding high quality NEW instruments that will be the “vintage collectible instruments” of the future.

With our reputation for accurately describing tonal characteristics of instruments we sell, you get the ‘right’ instrument for your playing enjoyment.

We are quite responsible, and maintain insurance for all stock items, as well as transitory instruments that are in our store for Appraisal, Repairs, Consignment, Trades, etc.

ALL instruments ship from our store only after redundant workbench inspection, ALL are insured, and ALL are shipped with a 3-day examination period.

Name: P R O V I S I O N Guitars
Description:
It all started when I first heard the band Kansas, and this amazing guitarist named Kerry Livgren playing a guitar that looked like nothing I'd ever seen. This Dean Cadillac sparked my lifelong affair with Dean Guitars. With many of my favorite artists playing Dean, it became clear my first guitars would also carry the Dean brand name.

Since the mid-eighties I have personally owned, played, collected, bought, and sold literally hundreds of Dean Guitars. From 1988 to 1997, I worked with Colie Stoltz Music company in Memphis TN and was an authorized dealer for Dean every single year. The Colie Stoltz Memphis Musicians Warehouse was an innovative warehouse music store and I am proud to have been a part of it. In what many consider the 'dark years' for Dean, we still supported the brand and sold guitars across the USA...way before the internet even existed.

From the early days, to the Sears Catalog days, thru the Tropical Era, the great comeback with Armadillo and Elliot Rubinson, and now the current team at Armadillo.... the Dean brand keeps moving forward .

ProVision Guitars was launched officially in 2020 to be the world's largest exclusive source for new, used, and vintage Dean Guitars. Our mission everyday is to help bring 'RockJoy' into the lives of guitarists by helping them 'Get Their Wings'!

Today we have over 200 guitars in stock, an incredible selection of accessories, direct access to pre-orders, and unbeatable service for any current owner of a Dean instrument.

Play Hard, Play Fast, Play Loud....Play DEAN!

Your friends at ProVision Guitars / RockJoy
The Dorroh Family

"Make a joyful noise unto the Lord" Psalm 100

Name: Huaihua XINPU Musical instrument Co., ltd.
Description:
Founded in 2008, Huaihua Xinpu Music Instrument Co. Ltd. (previously Huaihua Yueshida Musical Instrument Component Factory) has grown to become one of the largest professional manufacturers of music instruments in China. Xinpu's factory covers an area of 10, 000 m³ , with around 50 skilled and experienced workers and a monthly capacity of about 20, 000 units. We specialize in metronomes, tuners, music stands, guitar capos and other musical instrument accessories. We have passed ISO9001 and ISO14001 environmental management certification, assuring a superior quality of goods supplied to you.

Xinpu has built a strong reputation for quality and service. We continually invest in R&D, production technologies and marketing in order to maintain our position as the leading creative and responsible company in our field. We have obtained several design patents and Utility Model patents.

We regularly attend international musical instrument fairs as an exhibitor in China every year. Our own brands "Yueshida", "Artsilva" and "Yinda" have become commonly recognized in China, as well as in markets overseas. With successful markets established, we opened a brand new showroom in October 2015, which is located in the Huaihua Advertising and Creative Industrial Centre. The close proximity between the factory and the sales department (who moved into the new office) allows both sales and production departments to keep in close touch. This guarantees efficient communications between these two important departments. Additionally, the showroom offers a more pleasant environment, with extensive and complete product lines on display to our visiting customers.

Focusing on feedback from our customers, we will keep on developing high-quality products and services. And we are looking forward to more co-operation opportunities with overseas customers based on mutual benefits.

Our philosophy: Quality first, Reputation first, Management based, Service sincere!

What Sets Us Apart:
Patented cam-operated tremolo technology for unmatched tuning stability
Fully modular and customizable systems for endless configuration possibilities
45+ years of American manufacturing and hand-assembly to order
Used by renowned artists including Kerry King, Jerry Cantrell, and Victor Wooten
Comprehensive support via our video library and Kahler-Kast podcast
We're committed to combating counterfeits and ensuring every musician gets genuine Kahler quality. Whether you're a professional touring artist, studio musician, custom builder, or luthier, our hardware delivers the precision and reliability you need.
Our Mission: Help musicians achieve superior sound control and tuning stability through innovative, American-made tremolo technology.

Nel 1997, per accontentare non solo i chitarristi/bassisti ma anche gli altri musicisti di Bologna e non solo, viene fondata All For Music srl che si occupa della vendita di tutti gli altri strumenti (fiati, pianoforti e tastiere, batterie, archi, P.A., prodotti per DJ e recording).
Nel 2014 l'azienda decide di aprire un'altra sede in centro Italia; è così che nasce Sergio Tomassone Roma srl che, sullo stile della capostipite bolognese si impegna a proporre i principali marchi di riferimento del settore.
Ad oggi il gruppo occupa più di 20 professionisti impiegati nella vendita al dettaglio, assistenza post vendita, laboratori, amministrazione ed e-commerce.

Name: Manic Guitars
Description:
Hej, jag är Michael Åkesson, en passionerad och erfaren gitarrbyggare som specialiserar mig på att skapa handgjorda gitarrer av högsta kvalitet. Genom åren har jag haft äran att tillverka skräddarsydda gitarrer åt några av branschens mest framstående musiker, inklusive John Norum från Europe, Fredrik Åkesson från Opeth och John Leven, också från Europe.

Med min skicklighet och hantverk har jag strävat efter att tillverka unika instrument som inte bara lever upp till musikernas förväntningar utan även överträffar dem. Varje gitarr är ett resultat av min dedikation till detaljer, noggrannhet och passion för att skapa instrument som låter och känns inspirerande.

Att ha mitt arbete använt av sådana framstående musiker är en ära och en bekräftelse på att mina gitarrer levererar på högsta nivå inom branschen. Mitt fokus ligger alltid på att leverera instrument av högsta kvalitet som ger musikerna verktygen att skapa magi på scenen och i studion.

Jag ser alltid fram emot att skapa nya unika gitarrer och fortsätta bidra till musikens värld genom att erbjuda instrument som inte bara låter fantastiska utan som också är en förlängning av musikerns själ och uttryck. Låt oss tillsammans skapa instrument som inspirerar och lämnar avtryck i musikhistorien.

Name: Isler Irniger Sennhauser Geigenbaumeister AG Zürich
Description:
1972 gründete Rudolf Isler an seinem Wohnsitz im Kanton Glarus die erste Geigenbau-Werkstatt mit Schwerpunkt Neubau von Geigen, Bratschen und Celli.

Unsere Schwerpunkte

Unsere im In- und Ausland bekannte Geigenbauwerkstatt mit Schwerpunkt ”Barockinstrumente“ ist ausgerichtet auf Neubau, Restaurierung, Barock und Klassik-Rückbauten, Handel und Beratung sowie Vermietung von Streichinstrumenten für Unerfahrene, Lernende und Fachpersonen mit höchsten Ansprüchen. Sie finden Geigen, Bratschen und Celli, historisch eingerichtet oder modern. Auch Spezialitäten fehlen nicht, wie Viola d‘Amore, Violino Piccolo und Gamben. Dazu natürlich die passenden Bögen, Saiten und Etuis.

Unsere Ziele

Die Perfektionierung des gut 500 Jahre alten Geigenbau-Handwerks und die Pflege der Beziehung zu Ihnen, unsere Kundschaft stehen an erster Stelle. Durch die Vernetzung mit der modernen Welt des Geigenbaus und der Restauration arbeiten wir an der Spitze der Entwicklung mit.

Wir sorgen für die optimale Erhaltung und klangliche Einstellung Ihrer Instrumente, wobei die Grösse des Aufwandes in enger Beziehung zur Qualität des Instrumentes oder Bogens steht. Wer uns kennt weiss, dass unsere Begutachtungen auf dem Boden der Realität bleiben. Deshalb ist unsere Beratung so geschätzt.

Der Neubau von Instrumenten gehört zu unseren wichtigen Aufgaben. Über 140 in reiner Handarbeit gebaute Instrumente verliessen die Werkstatt. Das ausgezeichnete Verhältnis von Preis und Leistung erleichtert oft die Entscheidung zu Gunsten eines neuen Instrumentes.

Sie können mit unserer Hilfe das passende Instrument, den bestmöglichen Bogen finden.

Name: UKULELE VIEW
Description:
A ukulele is a small, stringed musical instrument that originated in Hawaii in the 19th century. It is a member of the guitar family and is similar in many ways, although it is smaller in size and has four strings instead of six. The ukulele's sound is characterized by its bright and cheerful tone, which makes it popular for a wide range of music genres, including pop, folk, and traditional Hawaiian music.

The ukulele is a versatile instrument that is easy to learn and can be enjoyed by players of all ages and skill levels. It is also a great option for those who want to take up an instrument but don't want the expense or bulk of a traditional guitar.

There are several different types of ukuleles, including soprano, concert, tenor, and baritone, which vary in size and sound. Soprano ukuleles are the smallest and have the highest pitch, while baritone ukuleles are the largest and have the lowest pitch.

Playing the ukulele can be a fun and rewarding hobby, and there are many resources available to help players of all skill levels improve their playing and learn new songs. These include online tutorials, ukulele clubs and communities, and instructional books and videos.

Overall, a ukulele is a great choice for those looking for a fun, portable and easy to play instrument that can create a lively and upbeat ambiance to any kind of music.

From the revolutionary Una Corda to our bespoke creations, each instrument embodies a fusion of cutting-edge technology and timeless artistry.

We believe in the power of vibration – not just as sound, but as an experience that inspires, heals, and connects. Our pianos are more than tools; they are partners in creativity, crafted to unlock new dimensions of musical expression. Whether for composers, performers, or enthusiasts, Klavins Pianos offers a unique sonic journey, rooted in passion and innovation.

Name: Teclacenter
Description:
A Teclacenter nasceu de uma história real, com alma, feita de música, família e paixão.

Nossa conexão com a música vem de mais de 120 anos de história — uma tradição passada de geração em geração, desde as festas em casa onde todo mundo tocava um instrumento, até o momento em que decidimos transformar essa paixão em propósito.

Em 2001, fundamos a Teclacenter com uma missão clara: tornar a música mais acessível, oferecendo instrumentos de qualidade com atendimento humano e especializado. Desde então, evoluímos com o mercado, com a tecnologia e, principalmente, com as pessoas que fazem da música uma extensão da própria vida.

Fomos uma das primeiras lojas virtuais de instrumentos musicais do país. Hoje, além do e-commerce: temos um showroom físico em Sorocaba (SP), dentro do Shopping Sorocaba, onde você pode experimentar nossos instrumentos com o suporte de quem entende — e ama — música.

Nossa equipe é formada por especialistas, pessoas que conhecem profundamente instrumentos musicais e estão prontas para orientar desde quem está começando até músicos profissionais. Aqui você encontra pianos acústicos, pianos digitais, teclados e instrumentos musicais das melhores marcas do mundo, com curadoria de quem vive isso todos os dias.

E mais: somos a única loja de instrumentos musicais no Brasil com o selo RA1000, reconhecimento máximo de excelência no atendimento pelo Reclame Aqui. Isso reforça nosso compromisso com a confiança, o respeito e a melhor experiência possível para nossos clientes.

Acreditamos que a música transforma. Por isso, nosso maior compromisso é oferecer a melhor experiência de compra para quem escolheu viver com música — seja em casa, no palco, na sala de aula ou no conservatório.

Seja bem-vindo à Teclacenter.
Aqui é a casa dos apaixonados por música.

Name: Making Waves FX
Description:
Music is as much about feel as anything else. Playing something new, relying on gut feel and raw creativity. Instruments, pedals, amps, kit… the search for tone can become a quest in itself. But ultimately it’s about loving music and finding inspiration to write or create something new.

From our custom enclosure, designed in house by us and fabricated by precision engineers in the UK, to the carefully selected components we use to build our pedals, we take time and pride in building outstanding products with attention to detail.

Like you, we’re musicians and guitarists at heart, and the bottom line is we love playing and making music. So we build pedals that we love, inspire us and make us want to play. So if you write one new riff, hear a different melody or find yourself sliding up the fret board, connecting notes in ways you’ve never thought of trying before, then we’ve achieved our goal.

We hope you enjoy our pedals.

Matt & James  |  Making Waves FX

Sklep posiada cztery oddziały, Salon Alt znajduje się w Lublinie przy ulicy Wolskiej 11, Salon Sopran znajdą Państwo w Zamościu przy ulicy Piłsudskiego 53, trzeci, noszący nazwę Bas, w Chełmie przy ulicy Lwowskiej 13B a także otwarty w 2015 roku Salon w Krakowie przy ulicy Surzyckiego 16. Dzięki czterem lokacjom sklepów, klient będzie miał większą szansę na dostępność towaru, a to bardzo ważne dla każdego komu zależy na tym by otrzymać zamówiony przez siebie sprzęt w jak najkrótszym czasie. Kolejną zaletą czterech oddziałów firmy jest możliwość zapoznania się z instrumentem przed złożeniem zamówienia. Jeżeli w danym sklepie nie będzie sprzętu który interesuje klienta, istnieje możliwość sprowadzenia go z oddziału, który dany towar posiada, dzięki czemu czas zamówienia jeszcze bardziej się skraca.

Name: Trumpetmania
Description:
Trumpetmania est une nouvelle école de trompette à Bruxelles dont la méthode d'enseignement est unique en Belgique. 

Elle est basée sur la technique de mémorisation de l’élève (visuelle, auditive, corporelle). Nous sommes tous différents et ce n'est pas l'élève qui doit s'adapter au projet pédagogique mais c'est celui-ci qui doit être pensé en fonction de lui. 
Cette méthode repose également sur l'épanouissement par la musique. Nos cours ne se limitent pas à l'apprentissage de l'instrument en tant que tel, nous accordons une grande place à l'assimilation de la musique par le corps. Pour cela nous formons l'élève à la rythmique corporelle et nous incluons des sorties, entre autres sportives, dans notre programme.

Les professeurs de l’école sont spécialisés dans des domaines variés : jazz, classique, technique de l’instrument, technique d’improvisation,… ce qui permettra a l’élève de choisir selon ses envies et de répondre à ses attentes. Il bénéficiera également d’un suivi personnalisé. Nos cours sont ouverts à tous les niveaux. 

C’est l’élève qui déterminera avec son professeur ses horaires. Cette flexibilité lui laissera une grande liberté dans l’organisation de son emploi du temps.
Le cursus scolaire s'étale sur trois années et permettra à l’élève d'acquérir une connaissance d'une grande partie des gammes, des rythmes, de développer son oreille musicale, une culture des grands moments de la musique et d'avoir une meilleure connaissance de son corps par l'approche du rythme et de la respiration.

Les perspectives recherchées par Trumpetmania pour l’élève est qu’il puisse rapidement être confronté au bonheur de jouer en groupe.

François Legrain : directeur de Trumpetmania

Our in-house repair shop provides everything from routine maintenance to advanced restoration, ensuring instruments play their best for years to come. We also offer private lessons taught by knowledgeable instructors, and our audio-visual division designs and installs custom sound, lighting, and video systems for homes, churches, schools, and performance spaces.

At our core, Haggerty’s is about people. We value honesty, expertise, and long-term relationships over quick sales. We take pride in creating an environment where musicians feel welcomed, supported, and inspired — a place where the passion for music is matched by a commitment to craftsmanship and service.

From the showroom to the stage, the classroom to the repair bench, Haggerty’s Music exists to empower musicians and strengthen our musical community.

Description:
MusicBros Coffee Music Shop konsepti ülkemizdeki müzik ve enstrüman kültürünü geliştirmek için 2017 yılı Nisan ayında iki kardeş tarafından fikri olarak kurulmuş bir start-up proje olarak yeni nesil müzik mağazacılığı oluşumu ve bir müzik kardeşliği kolektifidir. 

MusicBros, Coffee Music Shop konsepti müzisyenlere ve müziğe başlamış ya da yeni başlayacak hevesli bireylere -satın alma zorunluluğu olmadan- özgürce enstrüman ve ekipmanları deneme imkanı sunarken bu vaktin keyifli ve unutulmaz geçmesi için birçok özellikle donatılmıştır. Müzisyenler ve tüm misafirlerimiz ihtiyaç duyacakları ekipmanların yanı sıra günlük yaşamlarında kullanabilecekleri özel tasarım müzikle ilişkilendirilmiş aksesuarlardan, çeşitli tekstil ürünlerine, müzik aletlerinden, lezzetli tasarımlarda yiyecek ve içeceklere tek bir yerde ulaşmalarını sağlayan bir konsepte, mağaza içlerinde de birçok etkinliğin, atölye çalışmalarının ve akustik konserlerin gerçekleşeceği yeni evlerine -uğrak yerlerine- kavuşmuş olacaklardır. 

Bu müzik güneşi hareketinin öncelik olarak ülkemizin her şehrinde var olabilmesi adına bir yol haritasına sahip bu girişim; 2019 yılının ilk aylarında Ankara, Kızılay’da hizmete başlamış olup 11 ay süren demo günlerinin sonunda MusicBros markasının mevcut mağazası için konsept uygulamalarının tadilat süreci devam ederken dünya genelini etkisi altına alan pandemi süreci vuku bulmuş ve daha ferah günlerde hizmete devam etmek amacıyla mevcut mağazanın kapatılması kararlaştırılmıştır. 

Bugünlerde MusicBros ile müzik terapisi hareketinin İstanbul’da hayata yeniden geçmesi adına Kadıköy, Bahariye’de bulunan 500 m2’lik merkezi bir mağaza alanının keşif ve kiralama süreçleri devam etmektedir.

Çağımızdaki her yaştan olmak üzere yalnızlaşılan ve devamlı teknolojik cihaz kullanımı tercih edilerek geçirilen birçok yaşantının değişebilmesi adına gerçekten de paha biçilmez bir değerde ve önemde insanlığa özel bir hizmet sunmak için var oluyoruz.

Name: The Rocking Chair
Description:
The Rocking Chair delivers a revolution in the world of music tech. It's a groundbreaking chair meticulously crafted for guitarists, pianists and drummers.

But it's not just a chair - it's a comprehensive toolkit for the modern musician. The Rocking Chair combines 21st-century technology with comfort, aiding in not just playing these instruments, but making the learning process streamlined, enjoyable, interactive and fun.

The chair is ergonomically designed for guitarists, pianists and drummers which make up roughly 90% of new musical instrument sales.

It contains speakers built directly into the chair for a unique, enveloping playing experience.

Also built into the chair is a vibration / massaging effect that creates positive reinforcement with each pluck of the guitar string, press of the piano key or tap of the drumstick. 

With various tools at their fingertips, available through the built-in internet/wifi connected PC and monitor, musicians are able to take lessons from home via live zoom chats with pre-screened accredited teachers.

We aim to solve other key pain points through various proven techniques such as gamification, rewards for daily login which can be used to purchase coupons for upsells, and just general on screen encouragement as it can be very frustrating in the beginning when attempting to learn a new instrument. 

We also discovered that most people that want to learn a new instrument really do have a desire to learn, but once they buy their instrument of choice, they don't know exactly where to go from there. There is no clear road map. Most understand they could take lessons but in a lot of cases this takes effort and more money spent then they had envisioned. 

One final highlight worth noting while  researching and perfecting our prototype was: it doesn't hurt to include entertaining aspects, such as music synced lighting so it doesn't feel so much like "homework". We believe learning a new instrument should be fun.

A lo largo de estas décadas de actividad, hemos conseguido que las guitarras admira sean conocidas en el mundo entero y positivamente valoradas especialmente por su sonido, tan característico. A continuación, encontrarás las referencias más reseñables de nuestra evolución.

admira es una de las marcas de guitarras clásicas españolas más populares y vendidas en el mundo. Fabricamos nuestras guitarras con el mismo enfoque de calidad e ilusión que en nuestros comienzos. Ello nos ha llevado a alcanzar una producción total que suma ya 3.000.000 de guitarras admira repartidas por el planeta.

Durante nuestra trayectoria empresarial, diferentes generaciones han formado parte de esta gran familia que se ha dedicado al mundo de la música. Nos hemos transmitido las técnicas tradicionales de la fabricación y construcción de guitarras de generación tras generación. Ese conocimiento y afán se traduce en lo que admira somos hoy: una de las marcas de guitarra clásica española más reconocidas a nivel mundial.

 

Poco a poco hemos ido creciendo y ampliando la gama de guitarras admira que tenemos para ofrecerte. Incluso hemos lanzado admira Acoustics, la gama de guitarra acústica de admira y la admira Crossover, una guitarra con cutaway que está a caballo entre la guitarra clásica y la guitarra acústica. Asimismo, si te vas de viaje, o te gusta el sonido flamenco o te va la música folclórica, tenemos una admira para ti.

Name: PIPPA Pianos & Keyboards Tradeshow
Description:
“Rebuilding Our Piano Industry Together”

January 8-10, 2024

PIPPA is short for PIANO INDUSTRY PROFESSIONALS & PRODUCERS AFFILIATED and is a trade show event for piano dealers, piano sales people, manufacturers, and others connected to the industry.

South Point Hotel Casino & Spa 
9777 Las Vegas Blvd S, Las Vegas, NV 89183

What is PIPPA?
Rebuild the piano industry. Our goal is to rebuild the piano industry into a lively and energetic place by bringing everyone related to industry together and formulating new paths to success. PIPPA believes that the piano due to its versatility and charisma is both the bedrock and the crowning jewel of the musical instrument business.

Why PIPPA?
Fun & Business: PIPPA is the only trade show that is dedicated solely to the piano industry. It is a place to meet and come together as an industry. PIPPA Show will combine fun and entertainment with business. Rather than leave exhausted, PIPPA will seek to energize for the next business year.

The PIPPA Show
Piano People. We have put a council together to solicit input which includes P Hannah Beckett, an independent technician, owner of The Piano Buyer, and Pro PTN Executive Director (Council Member), piano industry leader Joe DeFio (Program Director), Laura Rose-Grabinski (Communications & Marketing), and piano industry leader Basilios Strmec (President). We are seeking the input and participation from all sides of the industry. If you are interested please reach out at: office@pippaevent.org

Who is organizing PIPPA?
Las Vegas. PIPPA will be at the South Point Hotel in Las Vegas (8-11 of January). We have reserved about 20,000 sq ft and can expand if there are others who will need more space. The Southpoint has about 2000 rooms.

Where will The PIPPA Show be?
Las Vegas. PIPPA will be at the South Point Hotel in Las Vegas (8-11 of January). We have reserved about 20,000 sq ft and can expand if there are others who will need more space. The Southpoint has about 2000 rooms.

Công ty Cổ Phần TM-DV-SX Việt Thương (Việt Thương Music) được ra đời vào năm 1993 và thành lập chính thức vào năm 1996 với khởi nguồn từ Trường Suối Nhạc – trường tư thục âm nhạc đầu tiên tại Việt Nam.

Tương tự như hệ thống phân phối nhạc cụ, chúng tôi phát triển thương hiệu Suối Nhạc phủ rộng tại nhiều địa bàn trong cả nước để đáp ứng nhu cầu học nhạc. Danh mục sản phẩm đầu tiên của Việt Thương là những cây Đàn organ và Piano mới toanh của Casio và Kawai Nhật Bản được giới thiệu tại thị trường Việt Nam. 
Là một trong những công ty phân phối Nhạc cụ có mặt đầu tiên tại thị trường Việt Nam, Việt Thương Music (VTM) luôn nỗ lực phát triển bền vững và cùng Việt Nam “Tiến tới tương lai”. Với nền tảng kiến thức âm nhạc, sự kết hợp làm việc của toàn thể nhân viên dựa trên phương châm Quyền lợi của Khách hàng là quan trọng nhất, VTM đã, đang và sẽ không ngừng cung cấp cho đối tác và người tiêu dùng giá trị đích thực với những Sản phẩm và Dịch vụ có chất lượng cao đạt tiêu chuẩn quốc tế với mức giá hợp lý nhất và dịch vụ sau bán hàng hoàn hảo. Chúng tôi tin tưởng sẽ luôn mang đến sự hài lòng cao nhất cho khách hàng, cũng như đóng góp tích cực cho sự phát triển của ngành Âm nhạc Việt Nam.
Sau gần 30 năm hoạt động, VTM đã không ngừng lớn mạnh và liên tục phát triển không chỉ về quy mô sản xuất, mà cả doanh số bán hàng. Hiện tại, Việt Thương đã trở thành một trong những nhà cung cấp và phân phối nhạc cụ hàng đầu tại Việt Nam và trong khu vực. Từ những khởi đầu khiêm tốn vào năm 1996, công ty đã phát triển lên vị trí dẫn đầu và tự hào với mạng lưới Đại lý, Showroom và hệ thống giáo dục âm nhạc rộng khắp cả nước.

Việt Thương cũng tự hào là đại diện nhập khẩu và phân phối độc quyền hơn 50 nhãn hàng nổi tiếng thế giới: Steinway & Sons, Boston, Essex, Kawai, Kohler & Campbell, Roland, Casio, Taylor, Fender, Pearl,… Đồng thời, là đại diện độc quyền và duy nhất được phép tổ chức thi và cấp chứng chỉ quốc tế London College of Music (LCM) thuộc University of West London tại Việt Nam.

Name: Lazer Music
Description:
Established in 1994, Lazer Superior Instruments Inc. ( Lazer Music ) was primarily created with the simple objective of fulfilling the need of the local guitar industry in Northern Luzon and Visayas Regions for guitar parts and accessories. However, the growing popularity and rampant development of music generated a demand for alternative sources for musical instrument procurement. Instrument players and music enthusiasts were in search of an outlet that is both credible and reliable. Lazer Music responded by opting to expand its product line to a complete selection of musical instruments. Subsequently, Lazer Music was able to contribute assistance and become an instrument in the widespread love and celebration of music.

In November of 1995, Lazer Music opened its first branch in SM North EDSA with only 7 employees; four sales personnel and three office staff. The branch initially offered a display of the available products, music lessons, and a band practice studio. With the public’s enthusiastic response, Lazer Music was able to further pursue its mission by opening a second branch in SM Fairview after a year.

Presently, Lazer Music remains motivated; employing over 150 personnel, accommodating more than 60 dealers, and operating 21 retail outlets located in different shopping malls nationwide. Furthermore, the brand offers a wider and steadily flourishing collection of brands of musical instruments and accessories. Lazer Music’s progress and growth are mainly attributed to its fair management, high quality and affordability of products, a team of highly trained staff, and passion for extending the love of music. For years to come, Lazer Music shall continue to persevere in broadening its reach and enhancing its service for music lovers everywhere.

Name: Tan Bridges
Description:
Tan Bridges offers high-performance headless guitar bridges, meticulously crafted from aerospace-grade titanium, aluminum, and solid brass. Our innovative bridges are engineered for smooth operation, exceptional tuning stability, and unmatched durability. Traditional headless bridges often encounter friction-related issues and string breakage due to tension. However, with our cutting-edge ball-bearing design, these problems are eliminated, providing guitarists with a seamless tuning experience. This innovation allows for quicker, easier adjustments, so you can spend more time playing and less time tuning.

Designed with versatility in mind, each individual bridge piece can be precisely positioned to accommodate multiscale and custom guitar setups. Whether you're building a guitar with varying scale lengths or a mixed-scale configuration, our bridges offer ultimate flexibility and precision. Additionally, our bridges include integrated top locks, allowing them to support any number of strings without the need for separate components.

At Tan Bridges, we are committed to delivering high-quality guitar parts through the use of premium materials and precision engineering. Our goal is to provide guitarists with reliable, durable, and easy-to-use bridge solutions that enhance performance.

Name: Matt's Guitar Shop
Description:
Dans un milieu où les objets de désir s'enferment généralement dans un coffre fort ou derrière une vitre fermée à clé, la collection de Matthieu Lucas fait figure d'exception rafraîchissante à la règle.

Il représente une nouvelle génération d'amoureux de la guitare pour qui la musique passe avant tout et pour qui le son est plus important que le numéro de série. Comme toute belle collection, celle de Matthieu Lucas a une spécialité : il chasse les instruments ayant appartenu à des artistes, de la Tele de Jeff Buckley à la Gibson de Tal Farlow en passant par Spot, l'une des rares Burst à se trouver en France et qui a de surcroît appartenu à Joe Bonamassa.

À force de persévérance, il est parvenu à ouvrir des portes généralement bien gardées pour accéder à des instruments qui n'étaient même pas censés être vendus. Et dans cette même logique d'amour de la musique avant tout, Matthieu n'est pas du genre à refuser qu'un guitariste profite de ses bijoux. C'est avec cette volonté de partager qu'il a fini par créer le showroom Matt's Guitar Shop, un lieu privilégié de vente et d'échange qui redonne à Paris ses lettres de noblesse dans le domaine de la belle guitare. Des instruments inspirés et inspirants, qui continuent de souffler de belles notes à l'oreille des amateurs.

Description:
JTal Guitars is a passion project and business founded on dreaming up, creating, finishing, restoring, resurrecting and assembling the best playing guitars one at a time, by hand and with the upmost attention to detail. 

Our foundation is built upon showing respect and paying tribute to the solid-body electric innovators like Leo Fender and Ted McCarty, Paul Bigsby and Les Paul, not to mention Wayne Charvel and Grover Jackson who made the phrase "Super Strat" a household name among guitarists. 

Simply put: We take the term "Partscaster" to a different level.

Name: Steinway Piano Gallery Stockholm
Description:
Steinway Piano Gallery Stockholm är hem till Sveriges största samling av exklusiva Steinwaypianon. Kända för sin rika, fylliga och balanserade klang har Steinways pianon sedan 1853 förkroppsligat ett oöverträffat hantverk, där precision och passion samverkar för att skapa instrument av högsta kvalitet. 

Vi är stolta över att kunna erbjuda ett exklusivt urval av några av världens finaste pianon, mitt på Gärdet i Stockholm. Här får du möjlighet att uppleva hur musikens själv möter förstklassig innovation.

Välkommen att besöka oss genom att boka tid eller dyka upp under någon av våra drop-in tider.

Name: The Guitar Master
Description:
The Guitar Master Shop is de ‘brainchild’ van de gelijknamige gitaarschool van Paul en Stefanie de Zeeuw. Leerlingen kwamen vaak bij hen voor advies over de aanschaf van een nieuw instrument. De drive en het enthousiasme waarmee Paul & Stefanie hen hielpen bij de keuze voor het perfecte instrument, is wat uiteindelijk tot de oprichting van deze shop heeft geleid. Want hoe belangrijk is goede begeleiding bij zo’n belangrijke beslissing? Zij doen er dan ook alles aan om samen met jou die droom gitaar te vinden!

Paul geeft inmiddels ruim 20 jaar gitaarles, waarvan sinds 2009 bij zijn eigen gitaarschool ‘The Guitar Master’. Door de jaren heen heeft hij al heel wat muzikanten van advies voorzien. De deuren van de school stonden altijd open voor leerlingen, vrienden, kennissen en muzikanten uit de lokale scene. Stefanie is door de jaren heen altijd druk in de weer geweest achter de schermen: van website & vormgeving tot de inrichting van de school zelf en productfotografie.

Daarnaast zetten zij zich ook geregeld in om (beginnende) muzikanten het podium op te helpen. Bandcoaching, clinics, workshops en muziekdagen… het duo draait hun hand er niet voor om. In 2019 leidde dit zelfs tot de eerste editie van Masterfest, een eigen festival met een spannend en afwisselend programma vol aanstormend en gevestigd talent. Tussendoor schromen ze ook niet om geregeld een concert of festival in binnen- en buitenland mee te pakken. Passie voor muziek? Dat is wat ons betreft een understatement.

Een gitaarwinkel is dan ook een logische stap voor het tweetal. “Als je 20 jaar bent kom je pas net kijken en heb je te weinig bagage om zo’n project op te pakken“, legt Paul uit. “Nu ben ik 45, en met veel vallen en opstaan heb ik onwijs veel geleerd. Deze kennis wil ik nu dan ook graag delen!”

Wij nodigen jou bij deze dus uit bij The Guitar Master Shop! Bekijk ons assortiment in de webshop of maak een persoonlijk adviesgesprek in onze showroom.

Name: Lombardo Handpan
Description:
Lombardo Handpan nasce dalla volontà del Maestro Loris Lombardo di creare uno strumento adatto sia a chi inizia ad approcciarsi all'handpan per la prima volta e sia a chi già conosce lo strumento e desidera averne uno professionale. Con il marchio Lombardo Handpan si ha la garanzia di uno strumento costruito e testato da un professionista del settore degli handpan.


Frutto di lunghi anni di sviluppi, prototipi e test sul campo, Lombardo Handpan è uno strumento davvero unico; interamente realizzato a mano, con passione e dedizione, utilizzando i più fini, puri e sonori materiali ed i più ricercati processi di finitura.


Facendoci ispirare dal mare e dal verde delle colline della Liguria, nella nostra ricerca del suono perfetto siamo andati oltre, creando suoni ricchi di armonici, che producono vibrazioni profonde ed intense, offrendoti il timbro che stavi cercando. L’attenzione per i dettagli si estende ad ogni fase della realizzazione dell’handpan, dalle materie prime al design, alle rifiniture finali.

Name: H2 Audio, Inc.
Description: Helios audio technology was the heart of the most legendary recording desks of the late 60’s British Invasion. Helios is one of the first console manufacturers that mass-produced mixing desks for the recording studio industry in England and eventually worldwide. The list of artists whose music passed through a Helios desk between 1964 to 1980 is unparalleled, and the sonic characteristics are synonymous with a whole generation of music. H2 Audio has painstakingly recreated the original Helios 0011, adhering to the original design and sound characteristics. In doing so, H2 Audio has created the most sonically accurate version of this recording industry classic to date.

At Roosters Acoustic, we have a passion for creativity and music, and we want to help you develop your creativity. 
Music has had a big impact on our lives. We want to share the music experience with you. We also believe that instruments are works of art. Every instrument should be as satisfying to look at as it is to play. New, used, or vintage, every guitar matches your personality.
Incorporate more music into your life with musical instruments and accessories. Roosters sells and rents acoustics and electric guitars like Riversong Acoustic, ukeleles, strings, picks and gig bags. 
At Roosters, we wanted to create a truly immersive experience when it comes to music. We offer live performances, and if you aren’t able to make it to Canmore, you can check out our vlogs for instrument tips and music for talented artists.
Come on down to Roosters Acoustic in Canmore to experience music and creativity for yourself.

What’s up with the Rooster?
Roosters Acoustics was inspired by an amazing piece of art by Linda Johnson. “Freddy” is a one-of-a-kind original encaustic (layered wax finished with a layer of lacquer) painting. “Freddy” has inspired our businesses for over five years, and he continues to inspire us. Name: Musician's Mall USA
Description:
Welcome to Musician's Mall, an enchanting haven for lovers of Indian music nestled in the vibrant heart of Berkeley, California. Step into a world where traditional melodies meet contemporary rhythms, and explore the rich tapestry of Indian musical traditions at this unique store.

As you enter Musician's Mall, you are greeted by the warm and inviting ambiance, where the scent of fine wood and the faint echo of exotic tunes fill the air. The store boasts an extensive collection of authentic Indian musical instruments, each a masterpiece in its own right. From the soul-stirring sounds of the sitar to the rhythmic beats of the tabla, Musician's Mall offers a comprehensive range of instruments that cater to both seasoned musicians and those embarking on a musical journey.

The walls are adorned with colorful displays showcasing an array of instruments, including the majestic sarod, the mellifluous bansuri, and the mystical tanpura. Knowledgeable and friendly staff members are on hand to guide you through the vast selection, offering insights into the craftsmanship, history, and unique characteristics of each instrument.

Whether you are a seasoned musician seeking a professional-grade instrument or a curious beginner looking to explore the world of Indian music, Musician's Mall has something for everyone. The store also stocks a curated selection of instructional books, sheet music, and accessories to support your musical endeavors.

Beyond the instruments, Musician's Mall serves as a hub for the local Indian music community. The store hosts workshops, performances, and events that celebrate the diverse and enchanting sounds of Indian music. It's not just a store; it's a cultural hub where musicians gather, share stories, and foster a sense of community.

Immerse yourself in the rich heritage of Indian music at Musician's Mall in Berkeley, where every instrument tells a story, and the melody of tradition resonates with the beats of the contemporary world.

Name: Sunreed Instruments
Description:
Sunreed Instruments is a service oriented business, dedicated to qualitative educational services, and highest quality products, to assist individuals and professionals, in the therapeutic and wellness communities, to understand and incorporate techniques and instruments in one’s practice, and to assist in creating or integrating right approach to a most effective practice or methodology in one’s practice, whether personal or professional.

For over 40 years we have specialized in the nature of sound as a healing methodology, used throughout history by most cultures, with growing interest, today, in clinical, therapeutic and medical settings.  From indigenous shamanic practices, to Tibetan and Hindu chanting, Peruvian mysticism, and modern scientific research, we understand the principles of the sound therapies that are gaining great accreditation at this time. We are a small company and highly service-oriented. We offer our many years of expertise to our customers in order to select the right instrument for their specific needs, and to educate them in their use.

We understand the importance of reliability and precision in audio equipment, which is why My Jack Guard is engineered to deliver uninterrupted sound quality for every performance and recording session. Whether you're on stage, in the studio, or on the go, you can trust My Jack Guard to provide the peace of mind you need to unleash your creativity.
As a veteran-owned company, we take pride in our commitment to excellence and our dedication to serving the needs of musicians and audio professionals. Name: The Loft Violin Shop
Description:
The Loft Violin Shop is a local, family owned shop in Columbus, Ohio specializing in orchestral string instruments: violin, viola, cello, and bass. We cater to both beginning students and professional musicians alike. Our services include rentals, repairs, and sales.

The Loft Violin Shop traces its roots back to the Joseph Ricker Violin Shop in Columbus, dating back to the late 1800's. Richard Schlub apprenticed in the Ricker shop before starting The Loft Violin Shop with his brother and current owner, David Schlub. Both Richard and David played with the Columbus Symphony at the time, and they identified the need for continuing quality craftsmanship and service in the Central Ohio string community.

Our dedicated staff is proud to provide exceptional stringed instruments, old world craftsmanship, quality accessories, and repairs. Our commitment to and support of local music programs is the foundation of our business.
