Name: Matteacci's
Description:
Robert Matteacci, è nato nel 1963 a Mola di Bari.
È un  imprenditore, musicista e designer.  Appassionato di musica e arti applicate.  Ha studiato Corno francese e Pianoforte al  conservatorio Musicale Nino Rota di Monopoli (Ba). 
 Da circa 20 anni vive e lavora a Nichelino Torino,  dove ha fondato il brand "MATTEACCI'S" specializzato nella costruzione  delle "Cigar Box Guitar" e strumenti musicali dal design originale. 
Le Cigar box Guitar sono strumenti musicali che  derivano dall'antico Liuto Africano.
Questi strumenti iniziarono ad essere costruiti nel sud degli Stati Uniti d'America dalla metà del 1800 per mano degli schiavi che venivano occupati nelle coltivazioni di cotone nel Mississippi, e che da i loro canti di lavoro  nacque la musica Delta Blues.
 Da circa 10 anni Robert Matteacci recupera vecchie scatole in latta e scatole di sigari trasformandole in veri e propri strumenti musicali perfettamente funzionanti che vantano migliaia di appassionati e collezionisti in In talia e nel Mondo.

Name: Lutherie Musique
Description:
Depuis 1977, Lutherie Musique est bien plus qu'un simple magasin de musique situé à Saint-Alban. Nous sommes un lieu dédié à tous les passionnés de musique, que vous soyez un professionnel chevronné ou un débutant enthousiaste.

Notre espace d'exposition spacieux de 200 mètres carrés vous invite à explorer notre gamme impressionnante d'instruments. Du saxophone à l'accordéon, du piano au violon, de la batterie à la guitare, notre magasin offre un choix exceptionnel pour satisfaire les musiciens de tous horizons.

En plus de notre sélection d'instruments de qualité, nous proposons également un atelier de réparation expert. Que vous ayez besoin d'une corde remplacée, d'une vérification ou d'un accordage, notre équipe est là pour vous servir et vous aider à maintenir vos instruments en parfait état de fonctionnement.

L'histoire de Lutherie Musique commence avec son fondateur, Christian Stramare, un musicien passionné, chanteur et batteur au sein d'orchestres. Son désir ardent de partager sa passion l'a conduit à ouvrir notre magasin.

Aujourd'hui, bien qu'il soit à la retraite, Christian a transmis le flambeau à sa fille, Cynthia. Cynthia partage la même passion musicale depuis sa jeunesse et joue de la batterie, de l'accordéon, du piano et du saxophone. Forte de plus de 24 ans d'expérience au service de notre clientèle, Cynthia est maintenant la gérante du magasin et est déterminée à perpétuer l'héritage musical de la Lutherie.

Name: Rhym.app
Description:
Müzik endüstrisinin önde gelen isimleri ve alanında uzman müzisyenler tarafından kurulan Rhym, dünyaca ünlü markaları güvenilir bir hizmet ve servis anlayışı ile uygun fiyatlarla müzik zevki, enstrüman tecrübesi veya çaldığı enstrüman her ne olursa olsun tüm müzikseverlere sunmayı amaçlayan bir topluluktur.

Misyonumuz, enstrüman seçimi ve bakımı noktasındaki bilgi kirliliğini şeffaf ve akılcı metodlarla gidererek tüm kullanıcılarımıza kaliteli bir hizmet verebilmektir.

Vizyonumuz, modern teknoloji ve çağdaş yönetim anlayışı çerçevesinde kurulan platformumuzda her seviye ve bütçeye göre ürün ve hizmet sunarak müziğin ve müzisyenlerin ihtiyaçlarına kalıcı çözümler üretebilmektir.

Name: Les Solfégiens
Description:
Des ateliers pour tous les âges !
Lors de nos ateliers offerts en CPE, en garderie privée, dans un autre service de garde ou en milieu scolaire, chaque groupe d’âge suit son propre programme d’éveil musical.

Name: Audible Steel
Description:
Audible Steel manufactures perfectly crafted guitar hardware for the discerning musician. 

Our premium aftermarket vintage-style guitar saddles are designed for musicians by a musician to enhance the sound and playability of all S-style guitars. 

Connect with us at hello@AudibleSteel.com

Name: Plug & Play
Description: Plug & Play es una tienda de instrumentos musicales, audio e iluminación que ofrece una amplia variedad de productos y marcas para satisfacer las necesidades de músicos tanto aficionados como profesionales. La tienda cuenta con guitarras, bajos, amplificadores, pedales de efecto, teclados, pianos, sintetizadores, baterías, percusión, equipos para DJs, cajas acústicas, mixers, micrófonos, interfaces de sonido, monitores y productos de alta fidelidad de marcas líderes en el mercado. Además, Plug & Play ofrece servicios adicionales como clínicas, workshops, un escenario para tocar y grabar, y servicio de reparación para instrumentos de cuerda. La tienda se enfoca en brindar asesoramiento profesional y cercano a todos sus clientes.
Location: Viña del Mar, Viña del Mar

Name: Marvin Guitars
Description:
Its best to hear about the company from Founder, and Master builder Keith himself: 

"I've always played and been inspired by vintage guitars. So, all the guitars I build are based on American made instruments from the 50s and 60s. It's only me, no employees, no cnc machines. I only use old school methods with routers, sandpaper, wood, and a whole lot of soul! Everything is made by hand, by me in my small shop in the Los Angeles area.

I only use electronics and hardware sourced from local small businesses, even down to the truss rods which are handmade by a local machinist. You can be assured everything in or on the guitars I make are of the highest quality."

Name: Texas Piano Restoration
Description: Texas Piano Restoration is dedicated to providing customers with the best service in the piano industry. We offer a wide array of piano services including piano restoration, refinishing, tuning, piano moving & storage, key-top replacement, piano repairs, player-piano systems and more. Click the link below to get in contact with us today!

Name: Finear Piano Service
Description: We offer piano tuning, maintenance, assessment, repairs, and restoration ensuring your piano always sounds its best. Trust us for professional, reliable service that treats your piano with the care it deserves.

Name: Magna Music
Description:
Bij Magna Music staat een team van toegewijde professionals voor je klaar, met uitgebreide kennis van alle muziekinstrumenten en accessoires die wij aanbieden. Wij richten ons volledig op het vervullen van jouw muzikale ambities.

Onze medewerkers delen dezelfde liefde voor muziek als jij en zijn altijd bereid om je te ondersteunen. Met hun diepgaande expertise en eigen ervaring als muzikanten begeleiden zij je naar de ideale instrumenten en apparatuur, ongeacht of je net begint of al jarenlang speelt. Name: musicmarket
Description:
Магазин musicmarket предлагает музыкантам и любителям музыкального творчества лучшие музыкальные инструменты и оборудование ведущих мировых производителей. Name: Violinchen - Geigenatelier Herzer
Description:
Wenn Sie ein Streichinstrument kaufen möchten, ob gebrauchte oder neue Geige, Violine, Bratsche, Viola, Cello oder ein Kinderinstrument, das genau auf Ihre Bedürfnisse zugeschnitten ist, sind Sie im Violinchen - Geigenatelier Herzer bestens aufgehoben. Egal ob Sie ein Einstiegsinstrument suchen oder fortgeschrittener Spieler sind, wir freuen uns über Ihre Kontaktaufnahme.

Wir bieten Ihnen Geigen, Bratschen und Celli (Bässe auf Anfrage) mit bester Preis-Leistung an. Neben den guten gebrauchten und wertvollen alten Instrumenten haben wir auch hochwertige neue Instrumente und Kindergeigen in allen Größen.

Gebrauchte Instrumente werden von uns überholt, auf Spielbarkeit und Klang getestet und spielfertig ausgeliefert. 

Wir beraten Sie gerne und ausführlich, wenn Sie ein Streichinstrument kaufen möchten.

Name: Cadenza Music
Description:
Cadenza Music has been in the same neighborhood of Saint Paul since it was founded in 1974, providing musical instruments for purchase and lease, instrument repair, sheet music, accessories and music lessons to the Twin Cities community.

Cadenza carries band instruments from Yamaha, orchestral instruments from Amati Fine Instruments, Alvarez guitars, Yamaha digital pianos, Amahi ukuleles, and a large variety of sheet music and musical accessories.

In January of 2019, former co-owners Eugene Monnig and Nancy Vernon sold Cadenza Music to long time employee, Dan Lehn. Since then, Lehn has continued to maintain the same level of service and quality for Cadenza’s customers and expand community involvement by adding early childhood music programs, additional group classes and utilizing recital space for performances.

Name: Leon Cymbals
Description: 100% handmade, Leon Cymbals proudly stands among the few remaining guardians of the legendary Turkish cymbal-making tradition. Each cymbal is forged from raw materials, fired with wood, and meticulously hammered and lathed entirely by hand. We reject modern mass-production techniques in favor of time-honored methods, preserving the soul and authenticity of classical cymbal craftsmanship. With over 15 years of experience, we produce only limited quantities to ensure the highest quality—each cymbal individually recorded and documented as part of our unwavering commitment to excellence. At Leon Cymbals, every piece is a work of art.

Name: Music House Bangalore
Description: Located in Bangalore, Music House is a music store featuring a large assortment of Western and Indian instruments. We have an extensive range of musical instruments in stock, such as guitars, violins, drums, and keyboards, in addition to an extensive assortment of musical accessories and amplifiers.

Name: Dollar Pedal Club, LLC
Description: Dollar Pedal Club is a Missouri-based e-commerce store catering to guitarists seeking unique tones. They stock a curated selection of boutique effects pedals from sought-after brands like JHS Pedals and EarthQuaker Devices.

Name: Replay Guitars
Description: Replay Guitars is a boutique musical instrument store and repair workshop. We specialise in servicing, setups, repairs, restorations, modifications, and customisations of both acoustic and electric guitars and basses among many other stringed instruments.

Name: Fuji String
Description:
Fuji String founded in 2000. After more than 2 decade, we had delivered great experiences to many guitar, bass, ukulele and violin enthusiast in Indonesia.

• Website : https://fujistring.com/
• Instagram : @fujistringid
• Facebook : Fuji String

Name: Symphonies Story
Description:
At Symphonies Story, we believe every note tells a story. As a premier destination for high-quality musical instruments, our mission is to empower musicians — from beginners discovering their first instrument to professionals perfecting their craft.

We specialize in premium instruments that blend craftsmanship, innovation, and timeless sound. Whether it’s strings, keys, percussion, or wind, each piece in our collection is handpicked to inspire creativity and elevate performance.

Proudly, we are the official Premium Retail Partner of Yamaha Music India — making us the only authorized Yamaha Premium Retail Store in Gujarat. This partnership ensures that our customers experience world-class instruments backed by authenticity, expertise, and trust.

As a trusted retail store, we go beyond selling instruments — we provide guidance, expertise, and a passion for music that helps our customers find the perfect fit for their musical journey.

Name: JPTR FX
Description: JPTR FX is a company based out of Rheinstraße 96, Wilhelmshaven, Germany.

Name: Casarão do Vinil
Description:
Welcome to Casarão do Vinil, one of São Paulo's cultural gems and the largest record store in Latin America. Founded in 2014 by Manoel Jorge Diniz Dias, known as Manezinho da Implosão, a renowned mining and energy engineer, Casarão do Vinil is much more than just a record store - it's a must-visit destination for lovers of music and Brazilian culture.

With an impressive collection of over 700 thousand records in our inventory, including LPs, singles, 78 RPM records, magazines, books, and comics, we cover a wide variety of musical and cultural genres, from classics to rarities.

Located on Rua dos Trilhos, 1212 (São Paulo - SP) in the traditional Mooca neighborhood, Casarão do Vinil is a meeting point for collectors, DJs, musicians, and music enthusiasts, offering a unique immersion experience in the history of Brazilian music.

In addition to our main store, we have Feirão 1 Milhão de LPs, a branch that offers vinyl records at affordable prices on weekends at Rua da Mooca, 3401.

Highlighted as one of the top 30 alternative tours in São Paulo by "Veja SP" magazine, we are proud to be recognized as an essential part of the city's cultural scene.

Whether you're a vinyl aficionado or just someone looking for a unique cultural experience, come visit us at Casarão do Vinil and discover the timeless allure of vinyl records.

Join us on our musical and cultural journey. Follow us here on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest news, events, and special offers.

Name: JLP Geluidstechniek
Description: JLP Geluidstechniek verzorgt geluid op professionele wijze op uw evenement. Benieuwd naar de mogelijkheden? Neem contact op!

Name: ADVENTURE GUITARS
Description:
Adventure Guitars welcomes you to the future of adventuring with music!

Our first guitar model, the CERBERUS, is the lightest most portable high-performance electric guitar ever made. Premium features and quality sound travel with you. Whether you're a seasoned pro, or just starting off on your journey, the Cerberus is your creative musical companion. From playing on the train, remote camping, or live on stage, the Cerberus performs the way you need it to. Never again leave your guitar behind. 

Engineered for Perfect Sound. Designed for Your Adventures!

Join the revolution and adventure on!

Name: Vulcan Cymbals
Description:
Nel 2017 nasce Vulcan Cymbals ed è subito un successo.
La società decide di focalizzare la propria attività sulla qualità  ritenendo che il marcato abbia sempre meno necessità di strumenti musicali industriali e sempre più di prodotti artigianali e dal design esclusivo.

Name: Kawai Brisbane
Description:
Kawai's Brisbane Showroom provides access to Kawai's full upright, grand, hybrid, and digital piano range.

Our showroom is a space for music enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels, offering an immersive experience with Kawai's renowned grand, upright, digital, and hybrid pianos. Come and browse the largest collection of piano sheet music in Brisbane.  

Join our musical community for an opportunity to engage with peers and experts, see exclusive performances, and join workshops and masterclasses with world-renowned pedagogues.

Name: Forte Piano Music Co.
Description: Forte Piano Music Co is a music company based out of 159 W Route 4, Paramus, New Jersey, United States.

Name: Sound Factory FZCO
Description: Founded in 2019, Sound Factory FZCO has rapidly emerged as a pioneering distributor of professional audio and musical instruments in the Middle East, Africa, and the CIS region. As a dedicated distributor, we have forged strong partnerships with local entities to access markets across the regions we support. We have amassed extensive experience and fostered strong relationships in the countries we serve, benefiting both manufacturers and national distributors through our consistent dedication and support.

Name: Mr & Mrs Piano
Description: We provide top quality acoustic upright and grand pianos for all types of events and venues in New York. Our team of professionals are dedicated to assisting you through the entire rental process. We have high quality Yamaha pianos which have been pre-selected by experienced musicians.  We know which piano will fit your event and space to make it remarkable.

Name: Unz Unz AB
Description: We provide creative music products for creative people.

Name: Electromúsica
Description:
A ELECTROMÚSICA é uma empresa especializada na área da música, estando particularmente vocacionada para a venda de instrumentos musicais e prestação de serviços relacionados com a música.
Com  mais de 35 anos de existência, tem-se afirmado no panorama nacional, tendo vindo a evidenciar-se em domínios mais específicos como a venda e serviços de aluguer de pianos acústicos – verticais e de cauda.
Na relação com o cliente, privilegiamos a competência técnica, a eficácia e o atendimento acolhedor e humanista, gerador de esclarecimento e confiança em quem nos procura.
Location: Vila Nova de Famalicão, Portugal Continental

Name: wonkystuff Ltd.
Description:
Based in York, UK, wonkystuff makes modules for the AE Modular synthesiser system.

Wonkystuff is also open to collaborations, particularly in firmware development — John’s background in hard real time systems for the automotive industry helps here! Get in touch if you have a project…

Until 2023 we put on gigs featuring several ‘weird and wonderful’ artists — this may start again in the future; stay tuned!

We also release music via our bandcamp page, occasionally venturing into physical releases on CDr and cassette.

Wonkystuff Ltd was incorporated in July 2025 and is registered in England with company number 16556103

Name: Destroyer Music Store
Description:
Nossa trajetória se inicia em 1995 com uma loja de cd´s na Galeria do Rock, desde então a Destroyer Music busca melhorar e ampliar o seu atendimento no ramo de instrumentos musicais.

Com mais de 25 anos de história,  nosso objetivo é a satisfação dos nossos clientes.

Name: Echowood
Description:
Our luthiery was founded in 2016 in Thessaloniki as a result of our love for music, creation, experimentation and wood as material. After years in various areas of music and understanding the needs of musicians, we try to meet the needs of both the beginner and the professional. Our goal is to build high-quality musical instruments with the best value for money. For this reason we produce lines of musical instruments with variation in terms of sound, raw material, aesthetics and cost.

At the same time, we are in a position to satisfy the particular preferences that one may have regarding the characteristics of the instrument.

Name: ML Percussions
Description:
ML Percussions is a company that provides high quality, hand made traditional percussions at affordable prices. 
We offer drums at wholsale and retail prices and also offer drum related services like repairs and accessory supply.

Name: Lorien Guitar Recovery
Description:
Lorien Guitar Recovery specializes in refurbishing guitars, (electric, acoustic, and acoustic electric), as well as ukuleles, basses, mandolins, and saxophones. Our mission is to encourage the reuse and re-housing of discarded or unwanted used musical instruments by repairing or refurbishing them and making them pleasing and playable again. The result is affordable and playable instruments and the reduction of land fill. 

We provide two Types of refurbished instruments. 

LGR Refurbished: We find guitars at auctions, garage sales, trades, etc. We take them to our shop and we make them playable and pleasing to own. LGR guitars tend to be 10-40 years old.  Many of these instruments are giftable, but they are used.

Factory Authorized Refurbished: Guitars and other string instruments that are refurbished by an east coast company that gets guitars from Epiphone, Fender, Squier, Guild, Samick, etc. most of these guitars are 1-10 years old. Almost all of these instruments are giftable. They are marked as used but in most cases are truly like new. 

New Instruments:
We are also a dealer for Nashville Guitar Works Guitars, a new company started by guitar players to make an affordable guitar that is playable out of the box. We carry their Acoustic, Acoustic Electric, and Electric Guitars and Basses, as well as their accessories and amplifiers. (Great deals on really playable new instruments, and cables).

Please visit our updated  website: www.lorienguitar.com

Name: Bosphorus Cymbals
Description: Bosphorus Cymbals manufactures and distributes drumset cymbals, bands, and orchestral equipment.

Name: El Cuartito Music
Description: Nos especializamos en ensayos, produccion, grabacion e innovacion musical.

Name: Goding Guitars
Description: Formerly apprenticed served boat builder with Oyster Marine and 30 year accredited front of house sound engineer, combining 40 years experience. Established for over ten years, focusing on looking after your cherished instruments, full restorations under taken, servicing, set ups, re-fretting, re-wiring, up-grades, head stock brakes, neck re-sets, bridge re-sets. All work undertaken by appointment only.

Name: Doremi Records
Description:
Doremi Records collects, records and reconnects the oldest instruments from all around the world. 
Our goal is to unite artists, collectors and music enthusiasts globally with a unique and characteristic instrument for their every needs. 

Due to more than 15 years of musical knowledge, Doremi Records is able to find almost every instrument upon personal request. Doremi specializes in: Violins, Trumpets, Flutes, Oboes, (Grand) Pianos, Saxophones, (Electric) Guitars, French Horns and many others. 

We have over 50 happy customers a year from all over the world that enjoy their special instrument daily. Some customers return for more and others buy a once in a lifetime instrument. The opportunities are endless.

Name: Siam Music Yamaha (SMY)
Description:
สยามดนตรียามาฮ่า ที่สร้างขึ้นจากปณิธานของ ดร. ถาวร พรประภา ได้รับการสานต่อโดย ดร.พรเทพ พรประภา เป็นผู้สืบทอดเจตนารมณ์ จนเป็นที่ยอมรับโดยทั่วไปถึงมาตรฐานของสินค้าทางด้านดนตรีภายใต้ เครื่องหมาย การค้ายามาฮ่า ประเทศญี่ปุ่น ได้แก่ สินค้าประเภทคีย์บอร์ด เครื่องดนตรีสำหรับวงดุริยางค์ เครื่องดนตรีสำหรับวงคอมโบ้ เครื่องเสียง Home Theater และ Professional Audio รวมถึงหลักสูตรการเรียนการสอนจาก Yamaha Music Foundation ประเทศญี่ปุ่น

ตลอดระยะเวลากว่า 40 ปีของการดำเนินงาน บริษัท สยามดนตรียามาฮ่า จำกัดและโรงเรียนดนตรียามาฮ่ามีความภาคภูมิใจที่ได้มีส่วนร่วมพัฒนาทั้ง ทางด้านเศรษฐกิจ คือ สร้างงานอาชีพทางดนตรีให้แก่ศิลปินและนักดนตรีมืออาชีพจำนวนมาก และร่วมพัฒนาสังคมด้วยการเสริมสร้างให้เยาวชนได้มีพื้นฐานทางด้านความรู้ เกี่ยวกับดนตรีอย่างถูกต้องเป็นไปตามมาตรฐานสากล โดยการเปิดเวทีเพื่อแสดงความสามารถทางด้านดนตรี จึงเป็นแรงผลักดันให้เกิดโครงการต่างๆมากมาย อาทิ Yamaha Thailand Music Festival, การประกวดวงโยธวาธิต นักเรียน นักศึกษา ชิงถ้วยพระราชทานฯ เป็นต้น พร้อมทั้งริเริ่มโครงการใหม่ๆที่มีประโยชน์และกำลังเป็นที่สนใจเพิ่มมากขึ้น และได้ดำเนินงานจัดกิจกรรมต่อเนื่องมาทุกปี

Name: Stockenhof Muziek
Description:
Op zoek naar een nieuw of tweedehands instrument? Bij Stockenhof Muziek vind je het grootste en meest verrassende aanbod – van gitaren en drums tot toebehoren en unieke merken die je zelden tegenkomt.

Wij selecteren elk product met zorg, zodat jij topkwaliteit krijgt voor een eerlijke prijs. En onze service? Die is minstens zo goed als ons assortiment. Of je nu online bestelt of langskomt in de winkel: wij staan voor je klaar.

Bestel je via onze webshop? Dan geldt dezelfde service en garantie als in de winkel. Meestal ligt je bestelling al binnen drie werkdagen op de deurmat – vaak zelfs sneller.

Toch liever eerst zelf spelen of voelen? Kom langs in onze winkel vlak bij Nijmegen. Of je nu een gitaar wilt testen, nieuwe drumstokken nodig hebt of advies zoekt over onderhoud: wij denken met je mee.

Bezoek ons van dinsdag tot en met vrijdag tussen 10:00 en 18:00 uur, of op zaterdag van 10:00 tot 17:00 uur. Je bent van harte welkom.

www.stockenhofmuziek.nl

Description: Con más de 36 años de trayectoria en la industria musical, A440 Pianos se ha consolidado como un referente en la comercialización de pianos en Perú y a nivel internacional.

Name: MOISAI
Description:
At MOISAI you will find handcrafted, unique design, high-quality steel tongue drums that make high frequency sounds & vibrations and are a unique way to relax.

We started this company to remind those
who need it the most to pause, take a deep
breath, and relax. Each of our products have

Whether you are looking for an
instrument to raise your vibrations or

to help you.

Sound is connecting us.
Experience it.

Name: L'Accordeur49
Description: Librairie musicale pour tous les instruments et magasin de musique spécialisé en pianos neufs et d'occasion

Name: Guitar Service Newcastle
Description: Guitar Service Newcastle has over 10 years of experience providing top-quality guitar repair, setup, and maintenance services in Newcastle. With top reviews on Facebook and Google, we have a proven track record of excellent service and customer satisfaction. We love guitars and treat your instrument with care and attention to detail. From minor repairs to complete restorations, we have the skills to get your guitar sounding and playing its best.

Name: Tony's Music Box
Description:
Tony's Music Box Ltd. is a family owned and operated retail music store which was established in 1975. Tony's has earned the reputation for providing a very friendly environment and a staff that is very honest and knowledgeable. We pride ourselves on premium customer service. We represent a wide variety of quality product lines for many instrument and audio categories including a large selection of instructional and songbook material. We provide rentals and in-store repairs for guitars and other stringed instruments. 

Tony George opened Tony's Music Box Ltd. in 1975, along side his wife Rosemarie (who managed all office duties). They worked as a team until her illness in 1998, which resulted in her passing in 2002. Although Tony has stepped down over the past few years, he always loved going to work, dealing with the public and suppliers alike. Providing musicians with their needs and seeing the enjoyment they received from participating in music gave him great pleasure.

Name: Orgelbau Pieringer e.U.
Description: Als langjähriges Unternehmen sind wir mit allen technischen Systemen vertraut und stehen Ihnen gern beratend zur Seite. Neben der Wartung, Stimmung, Restaurierung und Reinigung gehören auch der Neubau einer Orgel zu unseren Serviceleistungen.

Name: Earlynn Music
Description:
A l'origine de Earlynn Music, la rencontre de deux musiciens amateurs et passionnés, désireux de rendre la musique accessible à tous. 

La concrétisation de ce souhait passera par la création du "Roule ta gamme". Cet outil pédagogique a été pensé pour faciliter l'assimilation des gammes par une méthode d'apprentissage plus ludique et ainsi rendre la formation musicale plus accessible à tous. 
Cette invention brevetée fait de Earlynn Music une entreprise innovante ! 

Toujours dans le but de rendre la musique accessible à tous, L'entreprise a développé une gamme d'instruments à vent sous sa marque earlynn. Ces instruments sont conçus pour allier qualité acoustique, confort de jeu et esthétique originale, tout en restant accessibles en terme de prix. 

Nous proposons également la facture d'instruments (entretien et réparation) principalement des saxophones et clarinettes dans notre atelier-boutique de Labruguière (Tarn 81).

Rendez-vous sur notre site Internet ou dans notre atelier pour découvrir nos instruments, accessoires et produits d'entretien ou en savoir plus sur les services que nous vous proposons (Personnalisation d'instruments, Location, Dépôt-vente...).

Lionel vous réserve un accueil chaleureux au 14 rue Jean Jaurès à Labruguière (81290) :
- Lundi : 14h-19h
- Mardi / Mercredi / Vendredi : 9h-12h30 et 17h-19h
- Jeudi / Samedi : 9h-12h30

Name: Écho d'Artistes Académie
Description:

Implantée à Fronton, notre académie forme chaque année une nouvelle génération d’artisans et de créateurs dans des disciplines exigeantes et passionnantes : Lutherie guitare, Céramique, Aérographie, Construction bois & écoconstruction, Communication digitale.

 Notre mission : permettre à chacun de faire de sa créativité un métier d’avenir, en conjuguant savoir-faire technique, expression personnelle et engagement éthique.

 Nos formations sont :
• Qualifiantes & certifiantes
• Éligibles aux financements CPF / OPCO / Pôle Emploi
• Accessibles dès 18 ans, sans prérequis
• Basées sur l’apprentissage concret, encadré par des professionnels en activité

 Nos valeurs : Transmission – Matière – Humanité – Excellence artisanale

 Historiquement reconnue dans la Lutherie guitare, l’académie a élargi son savoir-faire à d’autres métiers manuels et créatifs, avec le soutien de parrains prestigieux comme Thomas Dutronc, Diane Tell ou David Reinhart.

 Vous êtes un particulier en reconversion ? Un futur artisan ? Un professionnel de l’orientation ou un organisme partenaire ?
→ Contactez-nous ou visitez notre site : www.echodartistes-academie.com

Name: Guitar Butler- Luthier and Guitar/Amp Repair Tech
Description:
I do work on all kinds of stringed musical instruments. Electric guitars and basses, acoustic guitars and basses, mandolins, ukeleles, and even violins or cellos. I do primarily instrument setups, fret work, and upgrades and modification installs that require to be retrofitted. I also have the ability to do finishing options as well as prepping bare wood guitars for finishing. Get a beautiful lacquer finish sprayed on your instrument in whatever color and clear coat you choose. 

I can’t very well call myself a tech without also providing repairs and general maintenance and upkeep for guitar and bass amplifiers. Bringyour tube amp or solid state and know that it’s in good hands. I am also able to make saddles for acoustic guitars and nuts for both electric and acoustic instruments as well.  As far as fretting work and jobs go I do complete fret dresses. A complete dress requires the leveling of the frets of the entire fretboard, then the frets must be recrowned, and then filed and polished back to desired luster. The same process is done on all refrets as well, which is when the frets in the neck are no longer able to do their jobs due to ware and lack of fret material left on the fingerboard. All or some of the frets will have to be pulled and new frets put in. If you have any questions about anything else that may not be meantioned here please contact me by phone or email. I am also getting into winding my own guitar pickups and making electronic component wiring harnesses.

Name: Sergio Tomassone s.n.c.
Description:
Da 60 anni ci occupiamo di vendita, assistenza e noleggio di strumenti musicali a corda con particolare specializzazione al mondo della chitarra e del basso.
Da semplice laboratorio di liuteria situato nel centro di Bologna da Sergio Tomassone, con l'arrivo dei figli Giampaolo e Davide, l'azienda negli anni si è ingrandita ed evoulta fino a diventare punto d riferimento nazionale per il settore.
Nel 1997, per accontentare non solo i chitarristi/bassisti ma anche gli altri musicisti di Bologna e non solo, viene fondata All For Music srl che si occupa della vendita di tutti gli altri strumenti (fiati, pianoforti e tastiere, batterie, archi, P.A., prodotti per DJ e recording).
Nel 2014 l'azienda decide di aprire un'altra sede in centro Italia; è così che nasce Sergio Tomassone Roma srl che, sullo stile della capostipite bolognese si impegna a proporre i principali marchi di riferimento del settore.
Ad oggi il gruppo occupa più di 20 professionisti impiegati nella vendita al dettaglio, assistenza post vendita, laboratori, amministrazione ed e-commerce.

Name: Dave Phillips Music & Sound
Description:
Dave Phillips Music & Sound is a musical instrument retail company based out of 377 Irwin St, Phillipsburg, New Jersey.

In the early seventies, Dave Phillips started out as an electronics tech in a successful music shop in central New Jersey. After several years Dave established himself as a respected expert trusted by musicians.

During this time many musicians were traveling long distances from eastern Pennsylvania and northwestern New Jersey for gear and service. It became clear there was a need for a music shop in this area. Dave pointed out to his shop owner the need for a store to help these working musicians but the owner had no desire to open another location.

In October 1977 Dave Phillips opened his first music and sound shop in northwestern New Jersey. Working tirelessly to help the local musicians, Dave along with his wife Alice, who has been with him every step of the journey, has built a shop that is reliable, honest and continues to evolve.

Since opening, the shop has grown to offer band and orchestra along with music education to provide a complete music shop experience that is for everyone. Dave Phillips' commitment to a better music industry has earned him the respect of his peers who elected Dave to serve on the National Association of Music Merchants board of directors.

"Where Your Music Starts!"

Name: Soundpaint by 8Dio
Description:
Soundpaint is a free and advanced software technology designed to offer the highest degree of fidelity and realism possible for digital music instruments.

The technology has taken 8 years to develop.  Everything is built from the ground up, including a new proprietary algorithmic audio format that allows us to render instruments in real-time.

The Soundpaint engine uses all the natural (im)perfections of instruments and can sound completely realistic or synthetic. It also has analog behaviors built-in.

Soundpaint is a colorful team of BAFTA, TEC and Emmy Award-winning producers, composers, and PHD’s fueling the technology and instruments that powers today’s biggest hit records, greatest blockbusters, TV and game scores.

We live, and create, in the twilight zone between technology and arts. 

We believe that technology is there to augment the musical experience, but never get in the way. 

Our Free Soundpaint Engine technology is specifically designed for the compositional workflow. Up to 10x Faster than conventional sample technologes. Super-Minimalistic UI powered by Ultra Deep-Sampled Instruments that can only live in Soundpaint due to our proprietary audio format.

Welcome to the dawn of Real-Time Sampling (RTS). Where beautiful waveforms makes beautiful music.

Aynı zamanda müzik eğitim merkezi bulunduran şirketimiz, müşterilerimize müzikal deneyimlerini daha da keyifli hale getirmek için hizmet vermektedir.

Firma olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini artırmak ve müzikal deneyimleri daha da keyifli hale getirmek için sürekli olarak kendimizi yeniliyoruz. Müşteri hizmetleri ekibimiz, satış öncesi ve satış sonrası destek sağlayarak müşterilerimizin her türlü soru ve sorununu çözüme kavuşturuyor. Ayrıca, müşterilerimize hızlı ve güvenilir teslimat hizmeti sunarak müşteri memnuniyetini artırmayı hedefliyoruz.

Sonuç olarak, Rota Müzik olarak Türkiye'deki müzikseverlere ve müzisyenlere dünya çapında kabul görmüş markaların kaliteli ürünlerini sunmak ve müzikal deneyimlerini en üst seviyeye çıkarmak için var gücümüzle çalışıyoruz. Kalite ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı yaklaşımımızla müşterilerimizin beğenisini kazanmaya devam ediyoruz. Sizlere de müzikal deneyimlerinizi daha keyifli hale getirmek için hizmet vermeyi arzu ediyoruz.

Name: Powell Flutes
Description:
The history of our company is inseparably linked to our founder and namesake, Verne Q. Powell. Originally a jeweler by trade, Powell crafted his first flute in 1910 using silver coins, watch cases, and spoons. This remarkable feat of craftsmanship earned him a position at a prominent flute maker in Boston, where he worked until 1926 before establishing his own company. His vision was clear: to create the world’s finest French-inspired flutes, instruments defined by artistry, precision, and beauty.

From the outset, Powell’s instruments were recognized as the pinnacle of flute making, quickly earning the admiration of leading flutists worldwide. In 1928, he completed his first flute entirely in 14K gold, soon followed by piccolos and alto flutes. By 1930, Powell flutes were represented in many of America’s leading orchestras, including those of Boston, Detroit, Philadelphia, Cleveland, Baltimore, and New York.

Innovation has remained a hallmark of Powell Flutes for nearly a century. The company was the first to commercially produce flutes with the Cooper Scale, the first to combine silver and gold with the revolutionary Aurumite flute, and the first to introduce flutes in 19.5K Rose Gold. In 2011, Powell reached new heights—literally—when NASA astronaut Cady Coleman brought her handmade Powell flute aboard the International Space Station, making it the first handmade flute to be played in space.

In 2016, Verne Q. Powell Flutes, Inc. became part of the Buffet Crampon family, joining nine other prestigious brands to form the world’s largest group of wind instrument manufacturers. One year later, the company proudly celebrated its 90th anniversary—a milestone honoring Powell’s enduring legacy of innovation, craftsmanship, and artistry, established in 1927 and carried forward with passion to this day.

We look to our half-century past to guide our future. Our unyielding passion about tone, personal specs, sound, and durability drives us to push string design – even reinvent the envelope itself when needed – to improve upon the product line, first and foremost.

GHS Strings takes this same approach to customer service. At a time where customers feel like they're talking to a robot, a GHS employee will answer your call! Customers, dealers or endorsing artists all receive the same attention. We mean it when we refer to our "Artist Family," because they are!

This is the story behind our amazing strings encouraging your journey – promising you'll never look back.

We are GHS Strings. Play with the best.

Name: Life Guitars Co.
Description:
Life Guitars Co. - a preloved and new guitar store based in Exeter. Our passion and vision is to breathe new life into old and used guitars, amps and pedals.

We stock acoustic guitars, electric guitars, bass guitars, effects pedals, amplifiers and all of the accessories that you might need along the way too (such as guitar strings, capos, straps, cables etc).

Our vision often means taking guitar gear which has been poorly treated or maintained badly and restoring them to the best possible condition. And the result; a guitar that has all the benefits of being ‘played in’ without the brand-new price tag.

This vision is also informed by a desire to look after the environment - to reuse, upcycle and restore used guitars instead of seeing them go to ‘the big gig in the sky’ at the expense of a brand-new instrument hot off the factory line.

We try to cater for players of all abilities, budgets and tastes, with guitars ranging from £50 starter instruments up to higher-end guitars at £1500 and above. These range from sleek jazz guitars to visceral metal machines (and everything in between).

Our store is small but perfectly formed and we usually have around 300 guitars in stock at any given time. We also offer guitar maintenance services including restringing, guitar setups, light repair, electrical repair etc.

We have worked hard to make the store a welcoming and safe space, for people of all backgrounds and abilities to come and enjoy exploring, trying out and possibly finding their next guitar. We don’t hard sell, we don’t pressure people and we don’t show off. That’s just not our vibe.

So, if beautiful secondhand (and some new) guitars, and friendly customer service, sound like your sort of thing, then why not get in touch and see if we might be able to help?

Nuestra misión es proporcionar instrumentos musicales de la más alta calidad y servicio excepcional a músicos de todas las edades y niveles de experiencia. Queremos ser un apoyo confiable y certero, nutriendo de conocimiento y pasión musical a las generaciones presentes y venideras en todo Chile.

En CASA AMARILLA, no solo vendemos instrumentos musicales; vendemos sueños, pasión y compromiso con la música. Ya sea que seas un músico profesional o estés dando tus primeros pasos en el mundo de la música, estamos aquí para acompañarte en cada nota de tu viaje, haciéndonos cómplices y entusiastas en el viaje musical de nuestros clientes.

Name: Battiloro Handpan S.r.l.
Description:
Il nostro viaggio attraverso l'universo musicale inizia nel 2007, quando un gruppo di amici, musicisti e percussionisti, scopre le potenzialità di un nuovo strumento: l'Handpan. Da allora, la passione per questo strumento si è unita alla competenza di una squadra di esperti artigiani, dando vita a Battiloro Handpan.

Nel rispetto delle origini di questo strumento, il processo di produzione degli Handpan Battiloro è ancora interamente artigianale. Un’attenta fase di progettazione e studio ci permette di assicurare una lavorazione esclusivamente a mano e 100% made in Italy, portata avanti da un team di artigiani di altissimo livello. Solo in questo modo abbiamo la possibilità di garantire a ciascun Handpan Battiloro il tempo necessario per essere scolpito, accordato a orecchio e rifinito, fino a diventare un pezzo unico.

Come un vestito sartoriale, ciascuno strumento ha voce e personalità irripetibili, come il musicista che lo sceglie. Per questo suggeriamo di provare i nostri strumenti di persona: saremo felici di darvi il benvenuto e aiutarvi a scegliere lo strumento più in accordo con i vostri gusti e le vostre esigenze.

LA NOSTRA VISION
Crediamo in un mondo in cui Artisti e Creativi possano esprimere le proprie idee e la propria arte lavorando nell’ambiente e nelle condizioni migliori per dare respiro alla propria creatività, senza limiti tecnologici e con la strumentazione migliore.

LA MISSION
Lavoriamo per migliorare la qualità del lavoro di artisti, produttori, musicisti e creativi attraverso il sostegno della cultura in ambito audio e selezionando accuratamente il nostro catalogo di prodotti per garantire sempre la massima qualità delle produzioni.

Sappiamo che l’Arte e la Creatività possono trarre enormi vantaggi dalla tecnologia e dall’innovazione e che ogni processo creativo ha bisogno di stimoli e ispirazioni. Per questo Milk Audio Store offre la migliore tecnologia e strumentazione al fine di creare attorno all'artista un ambiente che possa supportare la sua creatività e aiuti a mantenere il focus sui progetti.

IL NOSTRO CATALOGO

Our vast collection of instruments stem from the most prominent makers in the world of flutes/piccolos, oboes, bassoons, clarinets, saxophones, trumpets, French horns, trombones, percussion, and strings.

We care about our customers, the community, quality instruments, and unparalleled education. Whether you are beginning your musical journey or giving your old instrument an encore, we look forward to serving you for generations to come.

Name: Rekor Müzik
Description:
Rekor Müzik; 1979 yılında Ramazan Kor tarafından “Sol Klarnet” imalatı ile sektöre giriş yapmış olup, beraberinde perakende satış mağazasını açmıştır. 1997 yılında mağazasını merkezi bir konuma taşıyıp; 35m2 lik mağazasını 14 yıl içerisinde 350 m2 lik bir mağazaya dönüştürmüştür. Yıllardır Bursa’nın kalbi olan Şetbaşı şubesinde tüm Bursalıların bildiği bir ikon haline gelmiştir. Sadece perakende sektöründeki varlığı ile kalmayıp, sürekli araştırmacı ve yenilikçi politikasıyla 2005 yılında yurtdışından müzik aletleri ithalatına başlamış olup, satış yapmış olduğu bayilerine daima doğru, güvenilir ve karlılığı yüksek ürünler sunmuştur. Aynı zamanda alanında uzman kadrosu sayesinde; nefesli enstrüman imalatı yapmasının sağladığı avantaj ile tüm Türkiye’ye ve yurtdışı müşterilerine teknik servis hizmeti sunmaktadır. Şehrin batıya kayması ile birlikte; yoğun talep üzerine 2019 yılında Bursa Nilüfer’de ikinci şubesini açmış olup, perakende satış hacmini 500 m2 ye çıkarmış ve günümüzde, uzun yıllardır birlikte çalıştığı alanında uzman çalışanlarla tüm müşterilerine ilham veren Türkiye'de “Müzik Enstrümanları” sektörünün lider firmalarından biri haline gelmiştir. 

Müzisyenlerden ve müzikseverlerden oluşan bir şirket olarak, müziğin dünyadaki en büyük birleştirici güç olduğuna inanan ve bu fikir ile dünyayı müzikle doldurma misyonu üstlenen firmamızın en güçlü motivasyonu “Dünyada olumlu bir etki yaratmak için fark yaratmak”tır. Sonuç odaklı, güçlü ilişkiler kuran, ekip çalışmasına, işbirliğine ve sinerjiye inanan, kazan-kazan yaklaşımı sayesinde iş ortakları tarafından desteklenen ve yenilikçi çözümler sunan bir firma olması sayesinde iş dünyasında güvenilir bir güç haline gelmiştir.
Değerlerimiz
•    Müşteri  memnuniyetini daima ön planda tutmak.
•    Bayilerimizle  karşılıklı kazanç elde etmek.
•    Yapmış olduğumuz işleri "SONSUZ DÜRÜSTLÜK" ilkesiyle yapmak.

A true piano lover

Name: Clements Guitars
Description:
A sixth generation Texan with roots going back to the Texas Revolution, Trey Clements crafts artisan guitars in the shadow of Texas A&M University in the music-friendly city of Bryan, Texas.

"Before I had ever begun putting pencil to paper, I knew that I wanted my guitars to display the same courageous spirit that led my ancestors to shape not only their destinies, but that of Texas as well. From the legendary “Come and Take It” cannon to the sacrifices of “The Immortal 32” of the Alamo, to the battle cries of San Jacinto and beyond, these rich stories run deep in Texas lore. I’m proud to say the Clements family helped play a part in the Texas Revolution and shape the state we call home.

My guitars are not simply musical instruments, but a way for me to honor and continue telling the noble history of not only my ancestry, but that of all Texans. Joseph D. Clements’ original signature, pulled from an authentic document from the Texas Land Grant archives, serves as the official Clements Guitars logo on all headstocks and remains a constant reminder that pioneering spirit, grit, and devotion to cause are the prerequisites for those who desire to carve out a lasting legacy.”  - Trey Clements

Name: Tonante
Description:
Ela marcou a vida de muitos brasileiros nos anos 80, e esteve presente na iniciação musical de muitos artistas hoje consagrados. Após anos fora do mercado, a Tonante, que agora é uma marca do grupo Oderço está de volta, trazendo uma nova geração de violões e guitarras.

Criada em 1954 pelos irmãos portugueses Abel e Samuel Tonante, a marca ficou conhecida inicialmente como “Ao Rei dos Violões”. Com produção feita de maneira artesanal, a Tonante foi ganhando espaço durante o famoso movimento da Jovem Guarda, e teve papel fundamental na construção da história musical do Brasil.

Por ser comercialmente mais acessível para classe média da época, a Tonante foi o primeiro instrumento de muitas pessoas. Com guitarras elétricas da marca, desejo de boa parte da juventude, jovens viram o sonho de ter uma banda de rock se tornar realidade. Tudo isto fez com que a Tonante fosse hoje uma marca cheia de história, nostalgia e sentimento.

Mas, e agora quais são os planos da Tonante?

Sob propriedade do grupo Oderço, a marca está trazendo uma nova geração de violões e guitarras para o mercado.

Name: Lotus Trumpets
Description:
Our 1st generation trumpets were 
developed with Andy Taylor & Matt Martin in England.  Early on, the horns
were being handmade in Andy's shop, 
aside from our customized MAW valve
block, produced by Meinlschmidt in Germany.
 
We're now making 2nd Generation 
LOTUS Trumpets, which are very different beasts. Working with companies across Europe that specialize in particular
aspects of our operation brings us the highest quality products and services
available.
 
Our glorious bells are now made by Bernd Sandner in Germany.

We're also working with master machinist Marco Febbrari in Brescia, Italy for all our machined parts: leadpipes, receivers, braces, etc. 

Marco's machined parts have made a huge difference in how well our horns play, which is a very exciting upgrade.

Our assembly is impeccably done by Mateusz Zeszut & Mikołaj Durka at
ZM Concept in Poland.  

In the USA, our trumpets are assembled at Collins Music Center in Houston, Texas.

Our extended team includes various European companies for services like
scanning & 3D printing, and consultants such as renowned acoustic physicist, 
professor Gregor Widholm in Vienna. Meanwhile, Mark Schwartz, "accountant
to the trumpet stars" lends his expertise to our financial and legal needs from the
comfort of his home in Arizona.  

In the 21st century, geography is no barrier. Actually, the distance greatly improves our ability to assemble an all-star team. And our circle grows everyday with each new LOTUS owner or dealer who falls in love with our instruments, some of whom inevitably  bring new ideas and requests;  itches that we take pride in scratching for you.  

You can try a LOTUS Trumpet at your local dealer.  If they don't yet have any trumpets on hand, talk to them and ask them to buy LOTUS trumpets so you can try them.

Another option is to make use of our no-risk return policy, to try a LOTUS trumpet for a whole week in your home, on your gigs, wherever you like.

Name: Damon J Waller Consultancy Services
Description:
Damon Waller is a highly experienced international sales
and business development executive with over 40 years in
the professional audio and musical instrument industries.
Renowned for his strategic insight, commercial acumen,
and leadership, he has played a pivotal role in building and
revitalising some of the sector’s most respected brands.
As International Sales Director at Eminence Speaker
Company (2017–2024), Damon oversaw all global sales
across MI and Pro Audio markets, managing key OEM
partnerships with major names including Yamaha and
Fender. He strengthened the company’s worldwide
distributor network, drove consistent year-on-year growth,
and supported the successful transition of Eminence
following its acquisition by B&C Speakers in 2023.
Previously, as Managing Director of Orange Music
Electronic Company (2001–2013), Damon led one of the
most remarkable transformations in the MI industry. Under
his leadership, Orange grew from a legacy amplifier brand
with under $1 million in turnover to a global market leader
exceeding $20 million by 2012. He established subsidiaries
in the USA and China, expanded product lines, and guided
the company to three Queen’s Awards for Enterprise (2006,
2009, and 2012).Through his own consultancy, Damon J Waller Consultancy
Services, he has advised numerous international brands—
including Red Witch Pedals, Parsons Music, and Light
Lead (which secured BBC Dragons’ Den investment)—on
market entry, product positioning, and distributor
development. Earlier in his career, Damon built
foundational expertise in global distribution as International
Sales Manager at Trace Elliot Ltd, and began his journey in
MI retail with Holiday Music, London.
A former board member of the UK Music Industries
Association (MIA), Damon combines deep industry
knowledge with an entrepreneurial mindset and a passion
for connecting brands and customers worldwide. Based in
Essex, UK, he continues to work with clients across the pro
audio, MI, and technology

Name: Klavierhaus
Description:
Klavierhaus’ atelier is one of the few remaining in the world where the art of piano crafting is still practiced without compromise. Our pianos resonate with lyrical qualities inspired by the expressive instruments produced by master piano makers in the 1900s.

We do complete interior and exterior piano work as well as routine maintenance.

We also offer our space for concerts and recordings. We have a seating capacity of 60 persons, as well as built-in recording and livestreaming capabilities with multiple cameras. Our video content is viewable at youtube.com/c/klavierhaus

Klavierhaus was founded in 1993 by Gabor and Sujatri Reisinger in New York City. The brothers became known for their high quality craftsmanship and their collaborative approach to creating instruments according to the individual needs of artists.

Their efforts have earned international acclaim from world-class performers as well as students, teachers, and music aficionados across all genres. Many of them found a friend in the brothers and a home away from home at Klavierhaus.

Klavierhaus’ concert pianos have appeared on stage at venues such as Lincoln Center, Carnegie Hall, the Kennedy Center, the White House, Library of Congress, Jazz at Lincoln Center, the Metropolitan Museum of Art, the Whitney Museum of American Art, and have been included in the Yale Collection of Musical Instruments.

Musicians they have worked with include Richard Goode, Sir Andras Schiff, Gyorgy Kurtag, Angela Hewitt, Garrick Ohlsson, Herbie Hancock, Simone Dinnerstein, Yuja Wang, Geri Allen, and Jack DeJohnette.

Description:
Beautiful Noise Effects strives to alchemize traditional and experimental effects elements.

Established early 2018, though dreamt about for many years before, Beautiful Noise Effects, a small pedal company located and operating out of a garage in
the heart of Newcastle, Australia, with a catalog of effects made to push the boundaries of conventional guitar pedals to new experimental limits, while keeping a solid backbone to the fundamentals and versatilities of traditions.

Being a one-man operation, a total DIY approach has been taken with every aspect of production. Each pedal is assembled and built by hand taking months
to engineer, with special attention paid to using quality components, eye-catching visual aesthetics and playability, with a wide spectrum of experimental
capabilities.

The graphics are silk-screened in house using industrial strength epoxy inks for a premium and durable finish that will hold up in the most intensive and high-energy of environments.

Name: ReedFinder
Description:
ReedFinder is dedicated to solving the age-old problem of reed inconsistency for clarinetists and saxophonists. We help musicians find cane reeds that truly match their individual playing style and setup - not by manufacturing reeds ourselves, but by carefully selecting them from leading brands.
Every reed we ship is analyzed using a proprietary system that assesses key factors such as symmetry, grain structure, color, and other details that influence playability and consistency. This rigorous process ensures higher quality and more reliable performance for each reed.
Beyond quality control, ReedFinder offers a unique personalization process at the heart of our approach. Musicians can quickly provide feedback on each reed they receive via a barcode scan, creating a dynamic feedback loop. Over time, our system learns each player’s preferences, allowing us to select reeds increasingly tailored to their needs. This process also generates valuable insights for manufacturers seeking to understand how their reeds perform in real-world playing conditions.

Name: The Susanne Beer Cello Corner Foundation
Description:
The Susanne Beer Cello Corner Foundation is a registered charity that helps young cellists attain excellence in performance though cello and bow loans; performance opportunities; prizes; and tuition grants, in memory of cellist Susanne Beer. 

Susanne Beer was, for nearly 20 years, co-principal cellist of the London Philharmonic. She was also an inspirational teacher – and deeply committed to nurturing future generations of cellists. The Foundation is a tribute to Susanne and a means by which her life’s work continues.
